Task.Title: So Phuong Thanh Minh
Task.DoingTalk: Bai Kien <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color> O Tan Thu Thon
Task.CompleteTalk: Quan phien loan dang tung hoanh,Va dang rat can su giup do cua nguoi? Truoc khi hanh tau giang ho hay giup cho ta 1 vai viec

Task.Title: Bai Kien Long Ngu Thai Gia
Task.AcceptTalk: "<color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>": "Nguoi hay di tim nguoi tren dau co dau cham hoi, ong ta ten <color=#DD0000>Long Ngu</color>, 30 nam truoc la thu linh nghia quan. Hoi ay, moi nguoi goi ong ta la Long Lao Thai Gia, rat co tieng tam tren giang ho. Ong ta se chi bao cho nguoi nhung dieu vo cung co ich."
Task.DoingTalk: Thinh Giao <color=#FFCC00>Long Ngu</color>.
Task.QuestionTable: Nguoi co dau hoi tren dau bieu thi dieu gi|#Nhiem vu co the nhan Nhiem vu co the tra Mot ky hieu tuong trung Co ve nhu NPC dang rat tuc gian
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Long Ngu Thai Gia</color>: "Cuoi cung thi Thu Lam da bao nguoi den. Ta cung khong co gi nhieu de day cho nguoi, giang ho hiem ac kho luong, co mot cap mat tinh tuong thi moi viec se de dang hon. Neu nhin thay tren dau cua nguoi nao do co <color=#DD0000>Dau cham than</color> thi chac chan da co viec gi xay ra voi nguoi do, doi thoai voi ho de do hoi."

Task.Title: Thinh Giao Thu Di
Task.AcceptTalk: "<color=#DD0000>Long Ngu Thai Gia</color>: "Duoc, nguoi hay chuyen loi den <color=#DD0000>Thu Lam</color>, bao co ta khong can bao nguoi dem nhan sam den day nua. Tinh hinh kinh te cua nghia quan dang rat kho khan, ta khong the cu ngoi khong an bam mai. Nho truoc day ta buon ba giang ho, chi voi vai mon vu khi thong thuong ma ta co the doc ngang thien ha noi danh trong thoi loan the do!" Dung roi, trong nghia quan co cau noi " Tan Diet Kim Cau, Khoi Phuc Giang Son" sau nay nguoi se thuong nghe cau nay."
Task.DoingTalk: Quay Lai Thinh Giao <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Truoc khi buon tau giang ho, Ta se can nguoi giup ta mot so viec.

Task.Title: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua Thu Di
Task.AcceptTalk: Bach Thu Lam: "Lao thai gia that tre con, nghia quan ngheo thi ngheo, nhung moi thang ton vai luong mua nhan sam thi co dang la bao. nhung vu khi ma lao thai gia dung qua deu da tung lam nen lich su ca, hien gio dang duoc tu sua o <color=#DD0000>tho ren Diem Tuu</color>, nguoi hay den do lay. Nhung Diem Tuu la mot nguoi rat quai di, kho tinh, de ta khao nghiem nguoi mot vai kinh nghiem hanh tau giang ho, qua duoc ai cua ta, moi hy vong khong bi ong ta lam kho de."
Task.DoingTalk: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>.
Task.QuestionTable: Nguoi co dau hoi tren dau co y nghia gi|#Nhiem vu co the giao Nhiem vu co the nhan Chi la mot ky hieu Nguoi do dang rat tuc gian

Task.Title: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua Thu Di
Task.DoingTalk: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>.
Task.QuestionTable: Lam sao de mo ban do nho|Vuot man hinh tu tren xuong Vuot man hinh tu phai sang trai #An vao man hinh nho o goc ben phai Vuot man hinh tu trai sang phai
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot Lam, gio nguoi co the den tim Diem Tuu duoc roi.

Task.Title: Bai Kien Tuu Thuc
Task.AcceptTalk: Bach Thu Lam: hay mau den gap chu tiem binh khi, ong ta se giup nguoi co duoc vu khi de buon tau giang ho.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Chu Tiem Binh Khi <color=#FFCC00>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>: "Tan Diet Kim Cau, Khoi Phuc Giang Son!" Ai cha! Cai banh nay rat ngon, ruou nay cung rat ngon. Ngay ca vu khi ma ngay xua Long Ngu Thai Gia tung su dung ma Thu Lam cung mang tang nguoi sao? that la hao phong

Task.Title: Bai Kien Tham Ha Diep
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>: "Ta da tang cho nguoi vu khi cua Long Ngu roi, neu muon co them cac trang bi khac, hay den cac tiem trong thon. Bon ho thua duoi tay cua Diem Tuu ta nhung lai muon lo di, neu nguoi co the doi duoc giup ta, thi nhung thu do se thuoc ve nguoi. <color=#FFFF00>Chu tiem phong cu Tham Ha Diep</color>, la con gai cua Binh bo thi lang tien trieu, nguoi hay den tim co ta di."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Den Chu Tiem Phong Cu <color=#FFCC00>Tham Ha Diep</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tham Ha Diep:"Phong tru tran huong hoa di tan, nhat van quyen so dau. vat thi nhan phi su su huu, duc ngu le tien luu.' Di an cu si qua nhien tham thuy co cung. Ten say ruou cua tiem Ren bao nguoi den lay phong cu phai khong? Day, cam lay. nhung hom nay ta cam thay hoi buon chan, cung doan cau do voi ta nao!"

Task.Title: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua Tham Ha Diep
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Ha Diep</color>: Nguoi da san sang chua, ta bat dau hoi day!
Task.DoingTalk: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua Chu Tiem Phong Cu
Task.QuestionTable: Tim ta co the cung cap gi cho nghia quan?|Co the mua trang suc, sua trang bi Co the mua duoc pham, sua trang bi #Co the mua phong cu, sua trang bi Co the mua vu khi, sua trang bi
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi that la thong minh, da tra loi dung roi!

Task.Title: Bai Kien Hach Phieu Tinh
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Ha Diep</color>:"Tot lam. Tiep theo hay den gap<color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>, co ta khong de thoa thuan giong ta dau. Co ay xuat than tu gia dinh ngheo kho, o nhung noi cho bua, nen tinh cach rat chi ly, nguoi can khai kheo leo moi duoc."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Den Cua Hang Trang Suc, Bai Kien <color=#FFCC00>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Hach Phieu Tinh:"Hum hum! Lao gia nat ruou do bao nguoi den day lay trang suc phai khong? Ta thieu no ong ta bao gio? Dung la mot ten bit bom, xau xa.

Task.Title: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua Hach Phieu Tinh
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>: "Cai gi? Tham Ha Diep cung hua tang nguoi mot mon trang bi ah? Con dua ra cau do voi nguoi a? The thi khong duoc, nguoi cung phai tra loi mot cau do thi ra moi tang trang suc cho."
Task.DoingTalk: Tra Loi Cau Hoi Cua Chu Tiem Trang Suc
Task.QuestionTable: Tim ta co the cung cap gi cho nghia quan?|#Co the mua trang suc, sua trang bi Co the mua duoc pham, sua trang bi Co the mua phong cu, sua trang bi Co the mua vu khi, sua trang bi
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>: "Ha ha! nguoi that la de thuong, mau den day ta tang nguoi mon trang suc nay. nhung truoc tien hay di tham hoi cac chu tiem trong thon nay da.

Task.Title: Bai Kien Truong Tram Kinh
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>:"Tot lam. Tiep theo hay den gap<color=#DD0000>chu tiem thuoc Truong Tram Kinh</color>, hoi tham suc khoe cua ong ay
Task.DoingTalk: Bai Kien <color=#FFCC00>Truong Tram Kinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>chu tiem thuoc Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"Giup Diem Tuu den day doi no a? lao gia do that gian xao, duoc ta se giao cho nguoi thuoc da thieu ong ta, ta con tang them cho nguoi nua. Trong chon giang ho kho tranh duoc viec tan sat lan nhau,

Task.Title: Bai Kien Bat Dong Tien Sinh
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"Khong con viec gi nua roi, nguoi hay den gap<color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>chu tiem tap hoa di, Ong ta rat luoi bieng, ngay ca viec an ngu cung khong muon dong tay chan, cho nen duoc goi la Bat Dong Tien Sinh."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Den Cua Hang Tap Hoa. Bai Kien <color=#FFCC00>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>:"Doi nguoi neu co the bat dong thi bat dong di, moi lan dong la tieu hao nguyen khi, that uong phi. Sao? Nguyen khi la gi u? Nguoi hoi dung nguoi roi do! Chu nguyen trong chu nguyen khi, chu khi cung trong chu nguyen khi! E.... dung co danh nguoi chu, to chat, chu y to chat!"

Task.Title: Dot Phao
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>: Nao, ta co mot it <color=#DD0000>Phao Hoa</color>, nguoi ra<color=#DD0000>truoc Tuu Lau</color> dot giup ta de chuc mung cua tiem moi khai truong cua Dai Lao Bach."
Task.DoingTalk: Su Dung Phao Hoa Truoc Cua Tuu Lau
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Lao Bach</color>: Ha haha... lao tac Bat Dong bao nguoi den day a? Ong ta da gat nguoi day. Hom nay quan ruou nha ta khai truong. Khach den tham du deu se duoc mot tam ngan phieu, Bat Dong vi luoi nhac khong muon di, lai tiec cua, nen moi bao nguoi den day."

Task.Title: Mang Ngan Phieu Ve Cho Bat Dong
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Lao Bach</color>: Khong con viec gi nua, nguoi hay quay lai cho Bat Dong di.
Task.DoingTalk: Mang ngan Phieu ve cho Bat Dong Tien Sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>: "Ha ha ..Ta cu nghi lao ay se nuot loi, neu lao ay uy tin nhu vay thi rat dang de ket giao bang huu.

Task.Title: Giup Bat Dong Mua 2 Thit Xao Mang
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>: "Da noi bao nhieu lan roi, nguoi hay giup ta di tim chu tuu lau Dai Lao Bach, mua hai phan thit xao mang ve day. Noi nho cho nguoi biet, do an trong tiem nay moi chinh la thuoc tru thuong thuong dung trong giang ho day!"
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Chu Tiem Tuu Lau mua hai phan thit xao mang
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>: "Neu ta tiep tuc nho va nguoi thi that toi cho nguoi. Thuc ra tat ca nhung viec nay deu la sap xep cua Thu Di de thu thach nguoi do thoi.

Task.Title: Bai Kien Tuu Thuc
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>: "Thu Di du dinh dua nguoi den thap nhi mon phai tu luyen vo cong thuong thua, day khong phai la co duyen ma ai cung co duoc dau! Ngoai ra, ta tang them cho nguoi mot trang bi ma cuu kho lam ta moi co duoc. Hay den cho <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu</color>lay di."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Chu Tiem Binh Khi thinh giao
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>: "Lao gia Bat Dong da noi gi voi nguoi. Dung la mom mieng luyen thoang. Thoi, da den luc nguoi di ren luyen roi.

Task.Title: Dien Kien Tho San Doc Hanh
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>: Nguoi da hoc khong it cong phu, phia ngoai thon nay da thu hoanh hanh, nguoi co the dung mot so con vat de thu, Ngoai thon co mot tho san doc hanh ten la<color=#DD0000>Tham Thiet Thac</color>, la mot lao nghia quan. Han se co viec giao cho nguoi di lam. A! Han .... la mot quai nhan, nhung rat tot bung, du han co noi hay lam gi thi cung duong lay lam la."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Tho San Doc Hanh Tham Thiet Thach
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Thiet Thach</color>: Nguoi da den day roi, hay bai kien<color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color> cau ta co viec muon nho nguoi giup do

Task.Title: Giet Huou Thuan Duong
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Tai ha la Hua Si Vi, do de cua Tram Kinh tien sinh. Bay gio, cac ha hay di giet vai con huou, lay mot it <color=#DD0000>mau huou</color> mang ve nhe!"
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai huu thuan duong, nhan Mau huou
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Thieu chu than thu bat pham, Si Vi vo cung bai phuc."

Task.Title: Giet Khi Hoang
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Thieu chu! nguoi co the u giup mot it my tuu truoc khong?Ngoai thon co dam khi hay hai trom trai cay. Ra ngoai rung tim chung co the lay nguyen lieu de lam<color=#DD0000>Hau Nhi Tuu</color>."
Task.DoingTalk: Danh Bai Khi Hoang, Nhan Hau Nhi Tuu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Thieu chu than thu bat pham, Si Vi vo cung bai phuc."

Task.Title: Giet Ho Vang
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Thieu chu! nguoi co the giup ta mot lan nua, hay tim giet<color=#DD0000>ho vang</color>, nhan duoc Da Ho Vang mang ve day. Ta se cam kich vo cung.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai Ho Vang va nhan Da Ho
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Thieu chu that la nguoi tot. Ta se dung nhung thu nay chua tri cho Thiet Thach huynh.

Task.Title: Giet Gau Con
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Vai ngay nua la sinh nhat ty ty cua Thiet Thach do la Tham Ha Diep, Y nghe nguoi qua duong noi rang trong o Gau con co rat nhieu chau bau, trong do<color=#DD0000>Hac Tran Chau</color>la quy nhat. Phu nu neu deo mot chuoi Hac Tran Chau thi nhu tien nu ha pham. tu do y luc nao cung nhac den no, mo mong ve no, Thieu chu co the giup y hoan thanh tam nguyen do khong? Y se cam kich vo cung.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai Gau Con nhan Hac Tran Chau
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Tot qua, that la tot qua! Thieu chu la nguoi tot, cong phu cung rat cao cuong. Nho thieu chu lap tuc dem chuoi tran chau nay tang cho<color=#DD0000>Ha Diep ty</color> de hoan thanh tam nguyen cua Thiet Thach. lat nua ta se den gap Diem Tuu ke lai chi tiet nhung viec thieu chu da lam."

Task.Title: Tang Hac Tran Chau
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Si Vi</color>: "Vai ngay nua la sinh nhat Tham Ha Diep, Nguoi hay giup ta mang Hac Tran Chau tang cho co ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Doi thoai voi Tham Ha Diep trong thon
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Ha Diep</color>: "may ngay nay troi lanh thau xuong, benh cua Tieu Thach co le lai tai phat. Cam on nguoi da giup tim thuoc chua tri cho tieu de. A, Thu Lam ty hinh nhu dang tim nguoi do!"

Task.Title: Thinh Giao Bach Thu Lam
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Ha Diep</color>: "Thu Di dang tim nguoi do, hay mau den do di
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap Thu Linh Nghia Quan
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>: "Thieu chu, nguoi that la khien ta lo lang! Ben ngoai co rat nhieu bat trac, cong luc cua nguoi con yeu, sao lai tu tien di xa nhu vay chu?"

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Thieu Lam
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>: "Xem ra da den luc phai cho nguoi di luyen cong phu thuong thua cua thap nhi mon phai roi." Thap nhi mon phai co lich su lau doi, vo cong cua phai nao cung bac dai uyen tham, can phai tim hieu ky cang. Cung chinh vi ly do nay, nguoi can phai chon ky se vao mon phai nao. Trong thon nay co<color=#DD0000>de tu tiep dan</color> cua thap nhi mon phai, tot nhat la nguoi hay gap ho truoc, de hieu duoc truong phai vo thuat cua tung mon phai."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim De Tu Tiep Dan Thieu Lam
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tinh Huyen</color>: "Bon tu nam tren nui Thieu That o Ha Nam, huyen mon chinh tong, phat phap tram nam. Tram yeu tru ma, bao ve nhan tam la tam nguyen cua chung tang bon tu." Vo cong Thieu Lam ta phan ra hai he phai: Dao va Con. Ca hai deu la he ngoai cong. <color=#FFCC00>Thieu Lam Dao</color>: dong tac nhanh gon, su dung nhuan nhuyen loi tan cong bang cuoc phap. <color=#FFCC00>Thieu Lam Con</color>: Coi trong dong tac, tan cong manh me bang con.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Thien Vuong
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tinh Huyen</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Thien Vuong.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Thien Vuong
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bui Vien</color>: "Dong Dinh Ho song nuoc menh mong, la noi cuoc song het suc am no. Thien Vuong Bang ta tu khi Chung Duong Nhi Vuong sang lap den nay, tuan theo quan niem gom 8 chu sau: Trung ac Duong Thien, cuu dan tat kho." Vo cong Thien Vuong Bang ta phan ra thanh hai he huong: Thuong Thien Vuong va Chuy Thien Vuong, deu la hai he ngoai cong <color=#00CC00>Thien Vuong Thuong</color>: dong tac nhanh gon, manh me ve tan cong bang thuong. <color=#FFCC00>Thien Vuong Chuy</color>: dong tac nhanh gon, vo si su dung chuy co kha nang phong thu tot.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Duong Mon
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bui Vien</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Duong Mon.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Duong Mon
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Te Dan</color>: "Tu Xua Thuc dao khi di con hon len troi. Duong Gia Bao ta hung cu vung tay nam, trong long khong luc nao nguoi uoc vong nam lay vi tri dung dau vo lam trung nguyen, lam dieu gi do co ich cho nha Dai Tong." Vo cong Duong Mon ta phan ra hai he phai: Ham Tinh va Tu Tien. ca hai deu la he ngoai cong. <color=#FFCC00>Duong Mon Ham Tinh</color>: tuong doi coi trong dong tac, thich khach tinh thong tan cong tu xa <color=#00CC00>Duong Mon Tu Tien</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, du hiep tinh thong tan cong tu xa.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Ngu Doc
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Te Dan</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Ngu Doc.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Ngu Doc
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bien Nhat Xuan</color>: "Ba muoi nam truoc trieu dinh ra lenh truy sat, khien Ngu Doc Giao ta bi ep phai vao rung nguyen sinh phia Nam, toan quan gan nhu bi diet. Gio day bon giao da khoi phuc tro lai. Long nguoi trong thien ha giong nhu mot ngon lua, lam gi co dung sai, thang lam vua thua lam giac. Bai hoc xuong mau lan truoc chung ta nhat quyet khong lam phai lan nua." Vo cong Ngu Doc Giao ta phan ra hai he phai: Dao va Chuong. Dao Doc la he ngoai cong, Chuong Doc la he noi cong. <color=#FFCC00>Ngu Doc Dao</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, dao khach duy tri tieu hao suc luc dich thu tu xa <color=#33FF66>Ngu Doc Chuong</color>: rat chu trong dong tac, coi viec giay vo doi thu la niem vui.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Nga My
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bien Nhat Xuan</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Nga My.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Nga My
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Huyen Tinh</color>: "Nga My duoi su lanh dao cua chuong mon doi truoc Thanh Hieu su thai cung voi chuong mon hien tai la Vo Tuong su thai hien dang tranh vi tri dung dau vo lam voi Thieu Lam va Vo Dang. De tu trong phai deu la nu, chang mang the tuc, khong muon dinh vao chuyen an oan trong giang ho, giu gin ban than trong sach la duoc." Vo cong Nga My ta phan ra hai he phai: Chuong va ky nang ho tro. Ca hai deu la he noi cong <color=#33FF66>Nga My Chuong</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, ni co san long giup nguoi, tinh thong chuong phap <color=#FFCC00>Nga My Phu Tro</color>: dong tac nhanh gon, ni co tinh thong cac ky nang ho tro. Giup ich rat nhieu cho dong doi

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Thuy Yen
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Huyen Tinh</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Thuy Yen.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Thuy Yen
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>To Nha</color>: "Nam xua Thuy Yen Mon cuc thinh, tram hoa khoe sac, dung dau vo lam. Ngay nay cac su ty nam xua da co chon rieng cua minh, cac de tu nho con chua truong thanh, dang la luc thieu hut hien tai." "Vo cong Thuy Yen Mon ta phan ra hai he phai: Kiem va Dao. Dao Thuy Yen la he ngoai cong, Kiem Thuy Yen la he noi cong." <color=#FFCC00>Thuy Yen Dao</color>: vo cung chu trong den dong tac, de tu Thuy Yen an mac hop thoi, tinh thong dao phap thich sat du kich <color=#33FF66>Thuy Yen Kiem</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, de tu Thuy Yen an mac hop thoi, kiem thuat tu xa xuat quy nhap than.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Cai Bang
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>To Nha</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Cai Bang
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Cai Bang
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>La Tuan</color>: "Tran chien Thai Thach may chuc nam truoc, Cai Bang lao bang chu Ha Nhan Nga thong linh tu dai truong lao cung may nghin de tu tan cong quan Kim, giup Ngu Doan Van dai nhan giu duoc Truong Giang nhung cung ke tu do bi huy diet, so nguoi it di, khong con duoc nhu xua nua. Ta o trong thon nay, muon moi cac nhan si yeu nuoc gia nhap Cai Bang, cung chong giac Kim." "Vo cong cua Cai Bang ta phan thanh hai he phai: Chuong va Con. Con la he ngoai cong, Chuong la he noi cong." <color=#FFCC00>Cai Bang Con</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, nguoi tan cong tinh thong Da Cau Con Phap <color=#33FF66>Cai Bang Chuong</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, nguoi tan cong tinh thong Giang Long Chuong Phap.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Thien Nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>La Tuan</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Thien Nhan
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Thien Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Phi Kinh</color>: "ke tu sau khi trieu dinh cung Nam Tong nghi hoa, may muoi nam khoi phuc nguyen khi, thuc ra Thien Nhan Giao ta chang phai muon chien tranh? Co chien tranh, thi se co nguoi chet. Ai ma lai chang muon song? Nhung bon That Dat, Tay Ha cu dom ngo nhu ho doi, khong the khong phong bi." "Vo cong Thien Nhan Giao ta phan lam hai huong: Chien va Ma. Chien Nhan la he ngoai cong, Ma Nhan la he noi cong." <color=#FFCC00>Chien Nhan</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, ky binh so truong xung phong tran dia <color=#33FF66>Ma Nhan</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, di nhan co the su dung cac loai phap thuat.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Vo Dang
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Phi Kinh</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Vo Dang
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Vo Dang
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Minh Tue</color>: "Long Ho Dien tren nui Vo Dang chinh la ton chu cua dao gia thien ha. Sau khi chuong mon doi truoc la Thien Muc dao truong mat tich, Trung Duong chan nhan van luon dam nhan chuc vu chuong mon thay the. Vo Dang nam o bien gioi giua hai nuoc Tong va Kim lien tuc giao tranh. Chan nhan may nam nay lao tam qua do, hy vong co anh tai tre tuoi giup ong ta." "Vo cong cua Vo Dang ta phan thanh hai phai he: Kiem va Khi song tuyet. Vo Dang Kiem la he ngoai cong, Vo Dang Khi la he noi cong." <color=#FFCC00>Vo Dang Kiem</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, kiem si tinh thong thuat thich sat <color=#33FF66>Vo Dang Khi</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, so truong Ngu Khi Phap Mon.

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Con Lon
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Minh Tue</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Con Lon
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Con Lon
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Quy Kinh Tinh</color>: "Tay Con Lon quanh nam tuyet phu, Con Lon kiem tong neu khong co noi loan, Bang Tuyet Khi som da hoanh tao Trung Nguyen. Hien gio de tu Thu Thach tien sinh cua kiem hoang truong day la So Khi Thien tu Tay Vuc tro ve lien thu voi thu toa ha vien Ta Vu Dien, Con Lon Phai cuoi cung cung co duoc tinh hinh moi, that khien moi nguoi deu vui mung." "Vo cong cua Con Lon Phai ta phan thanh hai phai he: Dao va Kiem. Con Lon Dao la he ngoai cong, Con Lon Kiem la he noi cong." <color=#FFCC00>Con Lon Dao</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, nguoi tan cong thi trien dao the nhu gio tuyet <color=#33FF66>Con Lon Kiem</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, nguoi tan cong kiem khi tung hoanh

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Doan Thi
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Quy Kinh Tinh</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Doan Thi
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Doan Thi
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tu Tinh</color>: "Doan thi may tram nam nay doc long vi nuoc nhung mai van khong the thanh mot nuoc lon chinh la do hai bo O Man Toc va Bach Man khong the dong long hop suc giup nuoc. De quan duong thoi muon hoan thanh mot nghiep lon ma to tien Doan Thi da mong uoc tram nam! Do la thu nhan anh hung hao kiet khap noi." "Vo cong cua Doan Thi ta phan thanh hai phai he: Chi va Khi. Chi Doan Thi la he ngoai cong, Khi Doan Thi la he noi cong." <color=#FFCC00>Chi Doan Thi</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, chuyen gia can chien voi chi luc kinh hon. <color=#33FF66>Khi Doan Thi</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, noi ngoai cong luong toan dien, co the can chien va vien chien

Task.Title: Tim Hieu Mon Phai Minh Giao
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tu Tinh</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap de tu tiep dan Minh Giao
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Gap De Tu Tiep Dan Minh Giao
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dong Lang</color>: "Minh GIao ta suy yeu tu sau doi Duong, trieu dinh cam doan, chi truyen giao trong dan gian mot cach bi mat. Chinh vi vay ma bi nguoi doi hieu lam la giao phai ta ac, nguoi doi lam sao biet duoc noi niem nay chu? Nhung giao phai lon duong thoi quyet dinh nhap the cuu dan, dua hang van nguoi dan khon kho den mot tuong lai tuoi sang." "Vo cong cua Minh Giao ta phan thanh hai huong: Chuy va Kiem. Minh Giao Chuy la he ngoai cong, Minh Giao Kiem la he noi cong." <color=#FFCC00>Minh Giao Chuy</color>: chu trong mot so dong tac nhat dinh, ky binh chuyen dong nhu gio. <color=#33FF66>Minh Giao Kiem</color>: kiem khi xuat quy nhap than, lay thu cap doi phuong nhu lay do trong tui

Task.Title: Phuc Menh Thu Di
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dong Lang</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap Thu Di
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai tim Bach Thu Lam
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>: "Hien gio chac nguoi da tim duoc mon phai ung y, vay hay di gap de tu tiep dan xin <color=#DD0000>gia nhap mon phai</color>, roi quay ve bao cho ta biet."

Task.Title: Gia Nhap Mon Phai
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>: Tiep theo hay tim gap <color=#DD0000>de tu tiep dan cua thap nhi mon phai</color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim <color=#DD0000>de tu tiep dan cua thap nhi mon phai</color>, sau khi vao phai thi quay lai gap Bach Thu Lam lanh thuong.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>: "Thieu chu da gia nhap mon phai. That co ban linh, Thu Di cam thay rat vui."

Task.Title: Tim Gioi Su Phu
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>: :"Thieu chu nhan da nhap mon phai, co duoc tuyet hoc ho than, Thu Di khong con gi de lo lang nua. Hien co chuyen ky la, chi thieu chu moi giai quyet duoc."

Nhat thoi lao phu cung khong the dem toan bo thu phap thuan phuc Co Quan Nhan Tho va Tieu Co Quan Thu chi cho thieu chu, chi co the dua vao vo cong cua thieu chu, pha huy nhung Co Quan do, lay duoc chia khoa, de tranh xay ra tham hoa
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Co Quan Nhan Tho</color> de lay duoc chia khoa thach that

Task.DoingTalk: lap tuc den thinh giao<color=#FFCC00>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>:" Xem ra trong thon nay khong con an toan. Theo ta thieu chu nhan se khong ngoi yen lau, thuc ra dinh dua it do ra cho nguoi, gio xem ra da muon. Nhung hoc it ky nang song se rat co ich cho sau nay."

Task.Title: Gia Cong Thoi Dong Nhe
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>:"Nhan luc co quan thuy luu chua bi pha, ta se day nguoi vai thu de tap luyen."

Task.Title: Thinh giao Tham Ha Diep

Task.Title: Thinh giao Hach Phieu Tinh
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Ha Diep</color>:"Ha Diep ty khong con gi de truyen cho nguoi. Mong rang sau nay nguoi tim duoc ban doi cua minh tren giang ho, khong nen song co doc ca doi nhu ty! Hay di tim <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>:"Nhung chuyen do dau den luot phan nu nhi chung ta lo."

Task.Title: Gia cong Go thong
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>.Nao nao, lai day. Ta se day cho nguoi it tuyet chieu"

Task.Title: Che tao Tung Moc Phu

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>:"Lan nay ta lai dau tay doi voi a Tham Ha Diep, xem a con khinh thuong nguoi khac nua khong!"

Task.Title: Thinh Giao Truong Tram Kinh
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color> Hay di tim ten mot sach<color=#DD0000> Truong Tram Kinh</color>."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"Den day, con o ben ta tu nho toi lon, nay thon gap nguy, e rang da den luc con phai bon ba chon giang ho roi!"

Task.Title: Gia cong Tang hong hoa
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000> Truong Tram Kinh</color>"Tram Kinh thuc khong the cham soc con nua, chi co the truyen cho con ky nang lam thuoc cua ta."

Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>:"Chao thieu chu nhan, cau da den!"

Task.Title: Gia Cong Vai vun a ma

Task.Title: Che tao Truyen Tong Phu Tho
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color> " cu theo cach nay, nguoi co the dung Vai vun a ma trong o che tao vai cua giao dien ky nang song che tao thanh Truyen Tong Phu Tho, hay thu xem."
Task.DoingTalk: che tao<color=#DD0000>Truyen Tong Phu Tho</color>. an vao ky nang song=>che tao=>thu cong=>nhiem vu=>cap do 1.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>:"Thong minh lam, dung la tai khong doi tuoi, moi do ma nhung ky nang song co ban da nam het roi. Sau nay hanh tau gian ho, nhung ky nang do se vo cung can thiet, nhung hay nho muon tinh thong phai cham chi, khong duoc luoi nhac."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>:"Ai cha, tieu tu loi hai that!"

Task.Title: Thinh Giao chu tien trang Ta Hien
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color> " Ky Tran Cac chuyen ban cac loai binh giap quy hiem, than duoc cuu mang. Hay den thinh giao xem ong ta co gi day nguoi khong."

Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Hom nay, ta nhan duoc thu cua Bach Cuong, ong ay sap quay ve day. Nguoi co the tim Trau Duc Khoai hoi cho ro, tim duoc Bach Cuong, chac se co dap an chinh xac
Task.DoingTalk: di tim thu kho<color=#FFCC00>Trau Duc Khoai</color>.

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:" Sao? Bach Cuong bi truy sat a? Ta se phai mot doi quan tinh nhue den tiep ung.."

Task.Title: Tim Nguoi Mat Tich
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:" Nguoi tiep ung cho Bach Cuong bi sat hai tai Tuyet Van Pha, nguoi lap tuc len duong. Nghia Quan Tinh Nhue da xuat phat truoc, phai giu duoc tinh mang cua Bach Cuong bang moi gia."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tuyet Van Pha hoi ngo voi <color=#FFCC00>Cao Thang</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cao Thang</color>:" Bon ta ton that hon mot nua moi dua duoc Bach tien sinh den day. Nhung xung quanh da bi thich khach bao vay, theo thuc luc hien gio, kho ma thoat khoi vong vay."

Task.Title: Danh Bai Cuong Tac
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cao Thang</color>:" Bach tien sinh da hon me. Thieu chu, huynh de vong ngoai canh chung rat kho cuc. Xem ra, ta phai giup huynh de giet sach dam thich khach nay truoc roi moi ho tong Bach tien sinh ra khoi day!"
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai<color=#DD0000>Cuong Tac</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Thoi Kiem</color>:" Bach tien sinh uong chut nuoc da khoe hon. Vi chien dau lien tuc nen kiet suc, tam thoi khong the di lai."

Task.Title: Danh Bai Nghia Quan Phan Do
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Thoi Kiem</color>:" Dam thich khach do truy sat bach tien sinh hon 10 nam, nhung lai khong cung mot to chuc...O kia lai co nguoi den."
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai<color=#DD0000>Nghia Quan Phan Do</color>.

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cao Thang</color>:" Manh truc cuon bi vo si Nam Tong cuop di mot phan roi!"

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngo Hy</color>:"...."

Task.Title: Cau Than 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: den Cuu Lao Dong 1 tim <color=#FFCC00>Pho Thong</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Pho Thong</color>:"Nga My Son, khong biet co bao nhieu thieu nu bi chon vui trong ngon nui phat gia nay. Dem khuya nghi ve hong tran, nghi ve co nhan khong the nao quen."

Task.Title: Cau Than 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Pho Thong</color>:"Pho mo biet Nga My gioi luat nghiem ngat. Nhung nam truoc luc o Thanh Do, tinh co gap go de tu tuc gia Nga My, Lang Phong Nhan, ngay nho dem ong, khong co cach nao yen giac. Nguoi hay giup ta ket thong gia voi su phu cua Phong Nhan."
Task.DoingTalk: tim <color=#FFCC00>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>:"Pho Thong? Co nghe Phong Nhan nhac den, nhung viec nay tot nhat coi nhu chua tung xay ra, ta bat luan the nao cung khong the dong y."

Task.Title: Cau Than 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>:"Nguoi la nguoi mai moi, hay giup ta di Cuu Lao Phong giet Ac Vien, Cat tai cua chung, de chung minh thuc luc cua nguoi."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ac Vien</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>:"Tot...."

Task.Title: Cau Than 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>:"Nguoi noi voi Pho Thong, neu muon cuoi Phong Nhan, lay thu cap cua 3 van con Ac Vien, tru hai cho Nga My ta, thi ta se ga Phong Nhan cho han."
Task.DoingTalk: Bao lai tinh hinh cho<color=#FFCC00>Pho Thong</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Pho Thong</color>:"Cai gi! 3 van con, lao ni xao quyet...ro rang ba ta muon lam kho de ta! De ta suy nghi lai."

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: den Cuu Lao Dong 1 tim <color=#FFCC00>Ly Nguyen Khai</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly Nguyen Khai</color>:"30 nam truoc, That Tien Tu nui Nga My dung nhan tuyet the lam nghieng nga giang ho, 30 nam doi nguoi thay doi, den nay cau chuyen ve nhung thieu nu do da tro thanh truyen thuyet tuyet dep. Ta luon hy vong tim duoc nhung chuyen xay ra ve sau cua That Tien Tu."

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly Nguyen Khai</color>:"Co duyen rat tinh co, mot hom Nga My Phai Vo Tam su thai xuong nui, trong luc tu hanh bi ke cap lay het tien bac. Trong luc kho khan lai gap duoc ta, giup do ba ta chut tien. Ve sau moi biet, viec do lien quan den su song chet cua Nga My Phai. Cho nen di tim Vo Tam su thai hoi tham, nhan an hue cua ta, ba ta khong the khuoc tu."
Task.DoingTalk: Bai kien <color=#FFCC00>Vo Tam Su Thai</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Tam Su Thai</color>:"A Di Da Phat, thoi duoc, viec nay khong the che giau mai, cu de nguoi luong thien nhu Ly sinh ghi cheo lai cho doi sau."

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Tam Su Thai</color>:"Sach da giao cho Nga My ha vien cat giu tu lau, nghe noi dang o trong tay cac Kho Tu Ni trong ha vien, nguoi co the di tim ho hoi, nhung Kho Tu Ni khong hieu su doi, tinh tinh lai nong nay, lam viec nay co thuan loi hay khong con tuy vao ban linh cua nguoi."
Task.DoingTalk: Theo chi dan cua Vo Tam Su Thai, danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Kho Tu Ni</color>, la mau chot de lay thu luc.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly Nguyen Khai</color>:"Hay giao chung no Ly Sinh

Task.Title: Vo Niem Kiep 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngo Hy</color>:"Tot lam. bay gio hay tim gap Vo Niem Su Thai, ba ay co dieu muon pho thac."
Task.DoingTalk: tim<color=#FFCC00>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>:"Dam Kho Tu Ni ngay cang qua dang."

Task.Title: Vo Niem Kiep 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>:"Nguoi thay ta di day cho chung biet dieu mot chut."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Kho Tu Ni</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vo Niem Su Thai</color>:"Chung that su co ban linh khong coi ai ra gi, lan nay coi nhu la giao huan mot chut."

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kien Tinh Phong tim <color=#FFCC00>Ta Vu Dien</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Vu Dien</color>:"Vao mot dem mua, Thu Thach tien sinh mot minh di den tay Con Lon, lang le vac mot goi do trang tinh, ben trong la tin vat chuong mon cua phai Con Lon, Lac Anh Than Kiem. Goc gac cua ong ta that than bi, viec nay can phai co cau tra loi."

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Vu Dien</color>:"Neu noi tren the gian nay con co nguoi biet lai lich cua chuong mon, thi nguoi do khong ai khac chinh la lao tien boi cua Con Lon la mon chu Tuyet Son Phai Yen ba ba. Nguoi co the den Kien Tinh Phong de tim ba ta, va noi de tu ngu muoi Ta Vu Dien thinh giao."
Task.DoingTalk: Den nha nho cua Tuyet Son Phai, tim chuong mon <color=#FFCC00>Yen ba ba</color>, neu may man, ba ta se ke lai vai dieu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Yen ba ba</color>:"Kha kha, khong can noi. Ta da som biet khong som thi muon nguoi cung den tim ta."

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Yen ba ba</color>:"Ve chuyen cua nguoi, nguoi hay den tim de tu cua ta tren Tuyet Phong, co mot nguoi chinh la con gai cua Tong Thu Thach."
Task.DoingTalk: Con gai Thu Thach tien sinh Tong Qua Nhi la nu de tu o day, song duong nhu <color=#FFCC00>de tu Tuyet Son Phai</color>, dang tham do y tu cua ta.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Vu Dien</color>:"Von di, Thu Thach tien sinh chinh la mon ha cua Con Lon, nhu the thi qua la may man cho Con Lon ta roi!"

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 1/8
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kien Tinh Phong tim <color=#FFCC00>Ta Vu Dien</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Vu Dien</color>:"10 nam truoc, nhung mon nhan kiet xuat nhat trong Con Lon la Toan Co Tu, Thanh Lien Tu, Ngoc Hoanh Tu xay ra luc duc voi nhau. Ho tan sat nhau ma khong phat hien ra co tuyet lo gan do, vo so de tu tinh anh deu bi vui trong nui tuyet."

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 2/8
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Vu Dien</color>:"Mua xuan sap den roi, ta muon de tu trong bang den Dai Tuyet Son de cung te to tien va cho ho biet, cho du kho khan den muc nao cung khong nen lam loan, bi kich do khong duoc tai dien. Ta can nguoi giup ta di tien tram."
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim Thu Mo Nhan thu 1 <color=#FFCC00>Te Tu</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Te Tu</color>:"Oi, o day mua dong gia lanh, may hom truoc khong co thit de an, ta len vao Tuyet Vien Dong trom mot it thit tuoi cua bon chung."

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 3/8
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Te Tu</color>:"Bon chung rat gian du, khong can noi nhieu, mau giup ta giai quyet bon nua nguoi nua vuon nay di."
Task.DoingTalk: Te Tu vi gianh thuc an voi <color=#FFCC00>Tuyet Vien</color>, bi don vao son coc, hay giup ong ta giai quyet hiem nguy nay.

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 4/8
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Te Tu</color>:"Nguoi hay den cho Lao Mo Dung xem ong ta can giup gi khong."
Task.DoingTalk: tim den noi o cua <color=#FFCC00>Mo Dung Lao Bat</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Mo Dung Lao Bat</color>:"Nhac them xau ho....Bon Dao Nhan That Ngang Nguoc."

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 5/8
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Mo Dung Lao Bat</color>:"Lao gia yeu khong lam gi duoc. Hy vong nguoi co the giup lao."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet lu <color=#FFCC00>Vo Danh Dao Khach </color>,

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 6/8
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Mo Dung Lao Bat</color>:"Hay di tim Tiet Bach Sach. ong ta dang co chuyen gi do.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim <color=#FFCC00>Tiet Bach Sach</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tiet Bach Sach</color>:"Oi... Ta quanh nam o tren Tuyet Son nay, ngay ca vo cung khong cham soc duoc. May hom truoc ba ay den tham ta. Nhung giua duong bi bon Tuyet Vien treu choc"

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 7/8
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tiet Bach Sach</color>:" Phien nguoi giup ta day do bon chung
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Tuyet Vien Gia</color>,

Task.Title: Dai Tuyet Chi Chung 8/8
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve bao cao thinh hinh ho Ta Vu Dien
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Vu Dien</color>:" Thu Mo Nhan deu la nhung nguoi tan tam. Vat va cho nguoi qua!"

Task.Title: Dia Can Thao 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thanh Loa Dao tim <color=#FFCC00>Lu Tieu Ban</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lu Tieu Ban</color>:"Dung roi, lan nay Co giao chu dan do ta mang vai doa Dia Can Thao ve, giao chu som nghe don Dia Can Thao la loai hoa ky la tren the gian, dang ve thanh tu, mui huong nhe diu lan toa khap noi."

Task.Title: Dia Can Thao 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lu Tieu Ban</color>:"Nguoi da quen thuoc dia hinh tren dao, phien nguoi di mot chuyen, giup ta mang vai doa Dia Can Thao ve."
Task.DoingTalk: <color=#FFCC00>Dia Can Thao</color>, nhung loai hoa nay cam re rat sau, phai ton thoi gian de thu thap
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lu Tieu Ban</color>:"Vat va cho nguoi qua."

Task.Title: Uy Thac Cua De Tu Thien Vuong 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thanh Loa Dao tim <color=#FFCC00>U Uat De Tu</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>U Uat De Tu</color>:"Gan day tren dao xuat hien rat nhieu nguoi khong ro lai lich, bang chu phai chung toi di do la than the cua ho. Nao ngo ho deu la cao thu, chung toi khong nhung khong hoan thanh nhiem vu, nguoc lai con bi danh mot tran."

Task.Title: Uy Thac Cua De Tu Thien Vuong 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>U Uat De Tu</color>:"hay giup ta giao huan ho, dieu tra ro ho thuoc bang phai nao!"
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Hanh Cuoc Thuong Nhan</color>, dieu tra muc dich cua chung.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>U Uat De Tu</color>:"Hay nhan chut qua cam on cua ta."

Task.Title: A Lao Dau 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thanh Loa Dao tim <color=#FFCC00>Quy Thuc Ban</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Quy Thuc Ban</color>:"Thanh Loa Dao nay loan trong giac ngoai, Thien Vuong Bang ta lan dau gap tinh trang nhu vay, nhung nguoi con suc chien dau deu da ra chien tuyen het roi, Thien Vuong dang dung truoc hoa diet vong."

Task.Title: A Lao Dau 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Quy Thuc Ban</color>:"Thanh Loa Dao co 1 noi bi mat, che tao va cung cap binh khi cho tuong si. Nay gap con dai loan, khong biet noi do ra sao. Nho nguoi den do tham do 1 phen."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim <color=#FFCC00>A Lao Dau</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>A Lao Dau</color>:"U u a. Hay giup ta mot so viec."

Task.Title: A Lao Dau 3/4
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap <color=#FFCC00>manh sat vun</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>A Lao Dau</color>:"U u a."

Task.Title: A Lao Dau 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi bao tinh hinh san xuat vu khi cho <color=#FFCC00>Quy Thuc Ban</color>, tong quan.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Quy Thuc Ban</color>:"Tinh hinh che tao vu khi binh thuong chu? Nhu vay Thien Vuong Bang ta co bao ho roi, vat va cho nguoi qua."

Task.Title: Cung Chong Quan Quan 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thanh Loa Dao tim <color=#FFCC00>Chau cua A Lao Dau</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Chau cua A Lao Dau</color>:"Quan Binh trieu dinh dang do bo den day, vay bat Thien Vuong Bang. Nhung thon trang di qua deu bi thieu rui, ngay ca phu nu va tre em tren dao cung khong ta, qua that khong bang loai cam thu!"

Task.Title: Cung Chong Quan Quan 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Chau cua A Lao Dau</color>:"Cau xin hay cuu huynh de ty muoi chung toi!"
Task.DoingTalk: Giup Ngu Phu Thanh Loa Dao danh bon <color=#FFCC00>Tuy Tung Dai Noi</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Chau cua A Lao Dau</color>:"Nho phuc ngai, dam ngu dan chung toi moi co the thoat duoc kiep nan nay, neu nhu sau nay co them quan binh den hiep dap chung toi, ngai co the den giup chung toi khong?"

Task.Title: Bi An Phan Toc 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: den thanh loa dao tim <color=#FFCC00>thong linh tien phong Bach Pho</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Pho</color>:"Bang chung Diem Bang muon lam loan."

Task.Title: Bi An Phan Toc 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Pho</color>:"Bach mo biet cac ha anh dung hon nguoi, khong biet co the giup?"
Task.DoingTalk: di giai quyet<color=#FFCC00>Bang Chung Diem Bang</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Pho</color>:"Tot."

Task.Title: Bi An Phan Toc 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Pho</color>:"Bon chung van co bi mat gi do."
Task.DoingTalk: Tiep tuc tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Bang Chung Diem Bang</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Pho</color>:"That Nguong mo."

Task.Title: Bi An Phan Toc 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Pho</color>:"Hoa ra chung cau ket voi Trieu Dinh, dinh lam loan."
Task.DoingTalk: Danh duoi <color=#FFCC00>Tuy Tung Dai Noi</color>, sau do tim So Kiet thinh giao
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>So Kiet</color>:"That Nguong mo."

Task.Title: Bi An Phan Toc 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>So Kiet</color>:" Hay quay lai tim Bach Pho
Task.DoingTalk: quay ve gap<color=#FFCC00>Bach Pho</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Pho</color>:"Dai an cac ha, Bach mo that tui ho, thay mat huynh de Nhue Tiep Doanh da ta. Dau co chet, ta cung phai den truoc thu linh tranh dau."

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Than Bi 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:" Ta co mot goi y cho nguoi."
Task.DoingTalk: ve tan thu thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Than Bi 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:" Ta co mot goi y cho nguoi."
Task.DoingTalk: den<color=#FFCC00>Thanh Loa Dao</color> tim <color=#FFCC00>Luu Nhat Quan</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Nhat Quan</color>:"Thu Di phai nguoi den?"

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Than Bi 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Nhat Quan</color>:" Su tinh the nay. Tren Thanh Loa Dao, luon co mot so lu khach va thuong nhan da qua xet duyet. nguoi hay di tham do thu linh dam thuong nhan nay lai lich nhu the nao."
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Hanh Cuoc Thuong Nhan</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Nhat Quan</color>:"O? Thu nay la cua nguyen lao bang ta Cau Chi Thuy de lai? Xem ra ong ta van con nho chuyen nam do."

Task.Title: Hoang Lang Chi Bien 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang Lang Kim Quoc tim <color=#FFCC00>Bo Sat Phong No</color> nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bo Sat Phong No</color>:"Hum!!!."

Task.Title: Hoang Lang Chi Bien 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bo Sat Phong No</color>:" Khong hay roi! Trong dam tho xay Hoang Lang co ke tao phan. Nguoi hay lap tuc den tieu diet chung."
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Tho Xep Da</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bo Sat Phong No</color>:"Tot."

Task.Title: Hoang Lang Chi Bien 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bo Sat Phong No</color>:" Viec tiep theo la tieu diet Tho Dao Dat."
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Tho Dao Dat</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bo Sat Phong No</color>:"Nguoi lam tot lam."

Task.Title: Hoa Coc Lai Khach 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Bach Hoa Coc<color=#FFCC00>Doan Tieu Vu</color> nhan nhiem vu

Task.Title: Hoa Coc Lai Khach 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tieu Vu</color>"Nguoi muon vao Bach Hoa Coc, chi can nhan pham xuat chung, danh bai vai cao thu trong coc, se nhan duoc lenh bai vao Thuy Yen."
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FFCC00>Dao Khach Giang Ho</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tieu Vu</color>:"Nguoi lam tot lam."

Task.Title: Hoa Coc Lai Khach 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tieu Vu</color>"Mau tiep tuc di."
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FFCC00>Kiem Khach Giang Ho</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tieu Vu</color>:"Haha, hay lam. Lenh Bai day, cam lay."

Task.Title: Dieu Ke Binh Loan 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thien Tru Phong tim<color=#FFCC00>Lo Hieu Nhien</color>,nhan nhiem vu.

Task.Title: Dieu Ke Binh Loan 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lo Hieu Nhien</color>:", Nguoi hay giup ta tieu diet lu gian diep."
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Gian Diep Kim Quoc</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lo Hieu Nhien</color>:"..."

Task.Title: Dieu Ke Binh Loan 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lo Hieu Nhien</color>:", Rat tot."
Task.DoingTalk: Trung tri<color=#FFCC00>De Tu Bai Su</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lo Hieu Nhien</color>:"Nguoi qua that la tuoi tre tai cao."

Task.Title: De Tu Bi Thuong 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dong Thap Lam tim<color=#FFCC00>Trung Hue</color>, tiep nhan nhiem vu [De Tu Bi Thuong]."

Task.Title: De Tu Bi Thuong 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Trung Hue</color>:"Khong biet cac ha co the vao Moc Nhan Hang mot chuyen."
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Co Quan Moc Nhan</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Trung Hue</color>:"Cuoi cung ban tang cung duoc thong tha hit tho khong khi trong lanh."

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cuoi Cung 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dong Thap Lam tim<color=#FFCC00>Huyen Bi Dai Su</color>, tiep nhan nhiem vu [Khao Nghiem Cuoi Cung],
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Huyen Bi</color>:"Thieu Lam Moc Nhan Hang co tu khi xay chua Thieu Lam den nay. De tu Thieu Lam muon xuat su xuong nui phai vuot qua Moc Nhan Hang. Neu nguoi co hung thu, co the den thu. Trong 3 nen huong phai vuot qua Moc Nhan Hang, ta cho nguoi tai loi ra."

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cuoi Cung 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Huyen Bi</color>:"Trong 3 nen huong phai vuot qua Moc Nhan Hang."
Task.DoingTalk: Vuot qua<color=#FFCC00>Co Quan Dong Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Huyen Bi</color>:"...."

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cuoi Cung 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Huyen Bi</color>:"Rat tot, mau tiep tuc vuot qua Dong Giac Thu."
Task.DoingTalk: Vuot qua<color=#FFCC00>Dong Giac Thu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Huyen Bi</color>:"Tot lam, voi vo cong cua nguoi bay gio co he hanh tau giang ho duoc roi."

Task.Title: Doc Ke 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dong Bo Ho Truc Lam tim<color=#FFCC00>Duong Khuyet</color>, tiep nhan nhiem vu [Doc Ke].
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Khuyet</color>:"Gan day bon mon nhan duoc thu cua Han Pha Son tien sinh, muon cung Duong gia ta lien minh."

Task.Title: Doc Ke 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Khuyet</color>:"Ta muon nho nguoi giup ta mot viec!"
Task.DoingTalk: tim<color=#FFCC00>An Da</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>An Da</color>:"Doc duoc o day!Xin hay bao ve can than, neu de doc duoc tiep xuc voi nuoc thi chi con la mot dong la vun thoi!"

Task.Title: Doc Ke 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Khuyet</color>:"Hay den gap Ha Bang Tran"
Task.DoingTalk: tim<color=#FFCC00>Ha Bang Tran</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ha Bang Tran</color>:"Day la Bang Thien cua Ngu Doc Giao!"

Task.Title: Doc Ke 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ha Bang Tran</color>:"Hay ve bao tin."
Task.DoingTalk: ve bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00>Duong Khuyet</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Khuyet</color>:"Ha ha! Co duoc Bang Thien cua Ngu Doc roi, viec lon lo gi khong thanh?"

Task.Title: Tam Phap Mat Tich 1/9
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dong Bo Ho Truc Lam tim<color=#FFCC00>Duong Ngo</color>, tiep nhan nhiem vu [Tam Phap Mat Tich].
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Ngo</color>:"Ta da luyen Toai Vu Le Hoa Cham Phap den tang thu 3 nhung khong the nao tien bo hon nua. Nho co Duong Nhu su pho chi diem, moi biet duoc can co them bi kip cua 3 mon khac trong Duong mon, moi co the luyen tang tiep theo."

Task.Title: Tam Phap Mat Tich 2/9
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Ngo</color>:"3 mon tam phap kia do 3 dai de tu cua DUong Mon tu luyen. Nguoi co the giup ta chu?"
Task.DoingTalk: tim<color=#FFCC00>Duong Phi</color>, hoi tham ve Khinh Tam Thuat
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Phi</color>:"Hum! La ten Tieu Ngo sai nguoi den dung khong?"

Task.Title: Tam Phap Mat Tich 3/9
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Phi</color>:"Xui roi! Ta lo lam roi quyen tam phap xuong ho roi. Neu nguoi muon xem thi hay giup ta di vot no len. Nguoi tach tung trang trong tam phap ra phoi giup ta, sau do quay lai gap ta nhan nguyen cuon."
Task.DoingTalk: giup<color=#FFCC00>Duong Phi</color> phoi kho trang sach
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Phi</color>:"Tot lam! Da kho het roi! "

Task.Title: Tam Phap Mat Tich 4/9

Task.Title: Moi Han Duong Gia 1/3

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lang Phong Nhan</color>:"Nam do sau khi hoc vo thanh cong, lan dau xuong nui, vi cuu mot vi thieu nu ma bi de tu cua Duong Gia Bao vay danh, muon co do bat giam ta. Vo Niem su phu tim den Chu su Duong Gia Bao Duong Khuyet luc do, khi doi tha ta ra, da bi dung cuc hinh, khap nguoi day thuong tich, chi con thoi thop tho."

Task.Title: Moi Han Duong Gia 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lang Phong Nhan</color>:"Nghe noi gan day co Duong Mon No Thu xuat hien o Cuu Lao Dong 1, xe xac bon cau tac nay ta moi vui long. Nhung Nga My ta lam viec chinh nghia, khong can lay tinh mang cua chung."

Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang Lang Kim Quoc 3 tim<color=#FFCC00>Vinh Do</color>,nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vinh Do</color>:"Moi day co mot ten thich khach tu Nam Tong len vao hanh thich Hot Thach Liet Chap Trung tuong quan thi bi bat. Hien dang bi giam trong nha lao Hoang Lang nay, chi con doi trieu dinh ra y chi la ket an tram."

Task.Title: Giai Cuu Thich Khach 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vinh Do</color>:"Ta thuong hay uong chut ruou, uong say roi thi khong nho chia khoa nha giam de o dau.
Task.DoingTalk: Nguoi do dang bi giam trong nguc Hoang Lang, co cao thu canh giu, danh bai<color=#FFCC00>Hieu Uy Kim Quoc</color>,canh giu han
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vinh Do</color>:"Viec nay ta chang lay lam cam kich, chia khoa cung chua tung cho nguoi muon bao gio."

Task.Title: Thu Tai 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang Lang Kim Quoc 3 tim<color=#FFCC00>Ngot Tat</color>,nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngot Tat</color>:"Trong cuoc chien Thai Thach, bon giao thap tung dai quan xuat chinh, nhung mong xung ba vo lam, nao ngo nguoi Tong chong cu quyet liet, Huu Ho phap Gia Luat Ti Ly tu tran, Giao chu Hoan Nhan Hong Liet va bang chu Cai Bang Ha Nhan Nga dau den kiet suc ma chet, con lai Ta Ho phap Doan Moc Due quyet dinh lui ve o an."

Task.Title: Thu Tai 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngot Tat</color>:"Gio dang co 3 nguoi doi thu thach nhap mon, nhung ta lai qua ban, nguoi co the thay ta lam viec nay?"
Task.DoingTalk: Thu tai<color=#FFCC00>Lac Phat Son</color>.

Task.Title: Thu Tai 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngot Tat</color>:"Gio dang co 3 nguoi doi thu thach nhap mon, nhung ta lai qua ban, nguoi co the thay ta lam viec nay?"
Task.DoingTalk: Thu tai<color=#FFCC00>Tuong Nhat Pham</color>.

Task.Title: Thu Tai 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngot Tat</color>:"Gio dang co 3 nguoi doi thu thach nhap mon, nhung ta lai qua ban, nguoi co the thay ta lam viec nay?"
Task.DoingTalk: Thu tai<color=#FFCC00>Doan Dao</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngot Tat</color>:"Lam tot lam. Thien Nhan ta moi phuc hung, Dai Kim muon phuc hung, phai bat dau tu trong noi bo giao phai."

Task.Title: Thu Cu 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tay Long Ho Huyen Canh tim <color=#FFCC00>Nguy Truong Phong</color>,nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguy Truong Phong</color>:"Nam xua phu than ta la vong toc nuoc Kim, mau than tuy la nguoi Han nhung gia dinh rat hanh phuc. Ve sau phu than bi gian than ham hai, chuoc hoa diet mon."

Task.Title: Thu Cu 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguy Truong Phong</color>:"Nay ta hen de tu cua Anh Cuu Van danh tieng den Vo Dang chinh la muon dieu tra tung tich ke thu cua nha ho Nguy,han dang doi nguoi tren Mac Tri Thuy Dai o tang 2 Long Ho Dong."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim <color=#FFCC00>Do De Cuu Anh Van</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do De Cuu Anh Van</color>:"Muon biet ke thu cua nha ho Nguy sao?Haha."

Task.Title: Thu Cu 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: Nghi ngo han chinh la ke thu cua<color=#FFCC00>Nguy Truong Phong</color>,mau hoi bao
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguy Truong Phong</color>:"Vay sao? Dung la troi khong giup ta. Nhung chi can con song ngay nao, ta quyet bao thu den cung!"

Task.Title: Dep Loan Phi 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den tay bac Lu Vi Dang tim<color=#FFCC00>Hung Dinh</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hung Dinh</color>:"Con ta tu nho ham choi, tren dao co gi moi la no deu di xem. Trung Lu Vi Dang nay la nuoi khong nen den, nhung no khong nghe, lan nay dung la da gay ra chuyen roi."

Task.Title: Dep Loan Phi 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hung Dinh</color>:"Bon phi o day den quan binh cung khong lam gi duoc,"
Task.DoingTalk: Giup han tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Ta Ac Bang Phi</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hung Dinh</color>:"That nguong mo!"

Task.Title: An Tinh Duong Hieu 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tay Bo Ho Truc Lam tim<color=#FFCC00>Duong Quan Dung</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Quan Dung</color>:"Cong Tu Duong Hieu gan day khong vui, it di san. Ke be toi nhu ta rat lo."

Task.Title: An Tinh Duong Hieu 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Quan Dung</color>:"Cong tu Duong Hieu muon lay 99 Hoa Hong Mien, mot minh vao Nga My, no luc lan cuoi truoc Diep Van. Hy vong nguoi giup ta chuyen nay."
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai<color=#FFCC00>Bach Dien Khach</color>, nhan Hoa Hong Mien
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Quan Dung</color>:"Nhu vay, coi nhu chung ta da giup cong tu. Hy vong Diep tieu thu hoi tam chuyen y, cong tu tuy hoi ham choi, nhung lai rat tot bung."

Task.Title: Than The Vinh Giao Giao 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Xong vao Bach Hoa Tran tim <color=#FFCC00>Vinh Giao Giao</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vinh Giao Giao</color>:"Khi La Phong o Cai Bang den Thuy Yen Mon dua thu, da gap duoc tieu nu. La Phong sinh long cam men tieu nu, sau do lan nao cung lay co den tham. Tieu nu khong biet phai doi xu sao voi han."

Task.Title: Than The Vinh Giao Giao 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vinh Giao Giao</color>:"La Phong da phai de tu mang thu den Bach Hoa Tran. Nhung han lai vao nham tran phap, khong the tu thoat ra, nguy hiem dang can ke."
Task.DoingTalk: tim <color=#FFCC00>Ta Nhan</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Nhan</color>:"Da ta."

Task.Title: Than The Vinh Giao Giao 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Nhan</color>:"Chuyen loi cam on cua ta den co ay. on nay se co ngay bao."
Task.DoingTalk: quay lai tim<color=#FFCC00>Vinh Giao Giao</color>

Task.Title: Khach Phuong Bac 1/4

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nhan Xao Van</color>:"Gan day co mot nhom nguoi cu lang vang ben ngoai Thuy Yen Mon.

Task.Title: Noi Nhuc Su Mon 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Xong vao Bach Hoa Tran tim <color=#FFCC00>Dan Bich Tu</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dan Bich Tu</color>:"10 nam! Moi do ma 10 nam da troi qua. Tai hoa nam nao van nhu moi hom qua!"

Task.Title: Noi Nhuc Su Mon 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dan Bich Tu</color>:"Vu tan sat tham khoc do, hon 300 nguoi toan mon phai chi con lai 3 phan. Hien nay nhieu hai cot ty muoi nam xua van con nam tu tan trong Bach Hoa Tran,nguoi co the giup?"
Task.DoingTalk: tong cong phai thu thap 4 bo hai cot<color=#FFCC00>Hai cot nu </color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dan Bich Tu</color>:"Hai cot cac ty muoi da thu thap du....Liet to liet tong, xin hay phu ho cho Thuy Yen ta duoc binh yen."

Task.Title: Cuoc Kiem Khach 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den tay bac Lu Vi Dang tim <color=#FFCC00>Luc Tieu Lam </color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luc Tieu Lam</color>:"Hai ta cung ty thi, the nao?"

Task.Title: Cuoc Kiem Khach 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luc Tieu Lam</color>:"Lu Vi Dang nay rong lon, co nhieu kiem khach, bon ta ty thi trong mot nen nhang, xem ai tieu diet duoc nhieu hon!"
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Khoai Kiem Khach </color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luc Tieu Lam</color>:"Cao thu! Sau nay co co hoi se ty thi tiep! Chi can khong phai gap Ho Hien Co."

Task.DoingTalk: Den tay bac Lu Vi Dang tim <color=#FFCC00>Luc Tieu Lam </color>, nhan nhiem vu.

Task.Title: Cuoc Dao Khach 2/2

Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang lang Kim Quoc 3 tim <color=#FFCC00>Hoan Nhan Tuong </color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hoan Nhan Tuong</color>:"Toc Nu Chan tu luc A Cot Ta lap nen vuong trieu Dai Kim, von song noi rung thieng nuoc doc, gio tro thanh kinh do ngua de bat ngan."

Task.Title: Loan Trong Giac Ngoai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hoan Nhan Tuong</color>:"Hoang Ha vo de, vay ma co nguoi lay tien trieu dinh chi vien dan bi nan sua de bo vao tui rieng, la con sau mot cua quoc gia, la tai hoa cua dan."
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet tham quan <color=#FFCC00>Boc Tan Huan </color>.

Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hoan Nhan Tuong</color>:"Hoang Ha vo de, vay ma co nguoi lay tien trieu dinh chi vien dan bi nan sua de bo vao tui rieng, la con sau mot cua quoc gia, la tai hoa cua dan."
Task.DoingTalk: tiep theo diet tru tham quan <color=#FFCC00>Chuong Bach Vu </color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hoan Nhan Tuong</color>:"Day chi la mot phan rat nho. Xu ly iec nay giong nhu giay dan tuong bi gio thoi rach, dan duoc cho nay, lai rach cho khac, chua tri tan goc. Muon tao dien mao moi cho dat nuoc, can phai co quyen luc trong tay."

Task.Title: Trung Tri 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang lang Kim Quoc 3 tim <color=#FFCC00>Bo Sat Phong No </color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bo Sat Phong No</color>:"Gio day Hoang Lang sap xay xong, long ta nang triu nhu co da de, khong cach nao ngu duoc."

Task.Title: Trung Tri 2/2

Task.DoingTalk: trung phat<color=#FFCC00>Hieu Uy Kim Quoc</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bo Sat Phong No</color>:"Haha. Rat tot, tin chac gio day chung se khong dam lam loan len nua."

Task.Title: An Tinh Trac Van 1/7
Task.DoingTalk: Xong vao Bach Hoa Tran tim <color=#FFCC00>Gia Cat Trac Van</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Gia Cat Trac Van</color>:"Truoc day, tieu sinh den Dai Ly mua thuoc,co gap mot co nuoc xinh dep nhu tien. Sau do di do la, moi biet do la Lanh Nguyet Quan Am cua Thuy Yen Mon."

Task.Title: An Tinh Trac Van 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Gia Cat Trac Van</color>:"Hay truyen loi cua ta rang Trac Van ta nguyen lam moi viec cho nang. Chi can nang ay chiu chung song suot doi voi ta, Gia Cat se khong tiec hy sinh mang nay."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim <color=#FFCC00>Co Nguyet Hoa</color>, tham do y co nuong ay
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Nguyet Hoa</color>:"Ha? Ten Gia Cat kia lai am dau nua a?"

Task.Title: An Tinh Trac Van 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Nguyet Hoa</color>:"Thoi. Neu da vay, hay noi voi han, neu han co the danh bai Bach Hoa Tran Tu Dai Hoa Su ta trong 3 nen nhang, dong thoi danh bai Dien Quang Mau, thi ta se can nhac."
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Nam Phuong Hoa Su</color>.

Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Dong Phuong Hoa Su</color>.

Task.Title: An Tinh Trac Van 5/7

Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Tay Phuong Hoa Su</color>.

Task.Title: An Tinh Trac Van 6/7

Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Bac Phuong Hoa Su</color>.

Task.Title: An Tinh Trac Van 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Nguyet Hoa</color>:"Thoi. Neu da vay, hay noi voi han, neu han co the danh bai Bach Hoa Tran Tu Dai Hoa Su ta trong 3 nen nhang, dong thoi danh bai Dien Quang Mau, thi ta se can nhac."
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Dien Quang Mau</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Nguyet Hoa</color>:"Cho Thien Xao Tinh, nguoi tam thoi khong can di. Co nhung chuyen nguoi khong biet thi tot hon."

Task.Title: Muoi Nam
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Mau di tham hoi nhung bang huu xua, ho rat nho nguoi do."
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim <color=#FFCC00>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>:"Haha lau qua khong gap, Thieu chu, nguoi da khac rat nhieu."

Task.Title: Muoi Nam
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diem Tuu Thuc</color>:"Hay den gap Ha Diep."
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim <color=#FFCC00>Tham Ha Diep</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Ha Diep</color>:"Thieu chu, thay ta co dep khong?"

Task.Title: Muoi Nam
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tham Ha Diep</color>:"Hay den gap Hach Phieu Tinh."
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim <color=#FFCC00>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hach Phieu Tinh</color>:"Thieu chu, nguoi khoe chu?"

Task.Title: Muoi Nam

Task.DoingTalk: Di tim <color=#FFCC00>Truong Tram Kinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"Thieu chu....."

Task.Title: Muoi Nam
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"Mau den cho cua Lao Bat Dong."
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim <color=#FFCC00>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>:"Thieu chu. Nguoi phieu bat giang ho, khi co thoi gian nhat dinh ve thon nhe!"

Task.Title: Bien Quan Thai Hoc Sinh 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Han Son Co Sat tim <color=#FFCC00>Tien khan thu</color>,nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tien Khan Thu</color>:"Ten Lu To Kiem gia mom, nhat dinh phai cai voi Hoang Thuong de roi bi day. Bon hoc sinh cac nguoi cung the, tu nhien hua theo lam gio ta phai dua cac nguoi den thu vien de tu suy nghi ve loi cua minh."

Task.Title: Bien Quan Thai Hoc Sinh 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: ,color=#DD0000>Tien Khan Thu</color>:"Thu vien do Hua Hoc Vien quan ly, nho chao hoi ong ta!"
Task.DoingTalk: tim <color=#FFCC00>Hua Hoc Vien</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hua Hoc Vien</color>:"Nguoi vat va qua."

Task.Title: Bach Quan Pho 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Lam An Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Luu Toan Bao</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Toan Bao</color>:"Hien nay Ly Hau mot tay che troi, nguoi nha va han tin cua ba ta long hang trong trieu. Mot so trieu than ham quyen quy da tang boc ba ta het loi hong kiem loi."

Task.Title: Bach Quan Pho 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Toan Bao</color>:"Neu nguoi that long muon giup ta thi den quan doanh Thai Thach Co tim nghia huynh Luu Trong Lan cua ta, huynh ay se chi cach lay no."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thai Thach Co tim <color=#FFCC00>Luu Trong Lan</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Trong Lan</color>:"Thi ra do nghia de phai den, ta doi nguoi lau lam roi."

Task.Title: Bach Quan Pho 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Trong Lan</color>:"Nguoi viet Bach Quan Pho ten On Tuy Son, nhung han da xe no thanh nhieu manh roi dua cho cac Thu Quan giu. Nguoi hay nghi cach tap hop chung lai."
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Thu Quan Lam An</color>, nhan Manh Bach Quan Pho

Task.Title: Bach Quan Pho 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Trong Lan</color>:"Giet On Tuy Son."
Task.DoingTalk: Giet <color=#FFCC00>On Tuy Son</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Luu Toan Bao</color>:"Dung no roi! Haha! Luu Toan Bao nay sap giau to roi. Ta se thuc hien loi hua, day la le vat nguoi hay nhan lay, chung ta sap thanh nguoi co dia vi roi..."

Task.Title: Luoc Gia Trung Gioi 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: Den Han Son Co Sat tim <color=#FFCC00>Trieu Thinh</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Trieu Thinh</color>:"Chuyen dai nhan giup Gia Vuong da bi lo, nghe noi co nguoi tu hop tai Han Son Co Sat bao chuyen do tang cong voi Hoang Hau de duoc phu quy, trong do co ca nguoi cua Truong Ca Mon."

Task.Title: Luoc Gia Trung Gioi 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Trieu Thinh</color>:" Nguoi hay giup ta den Han Son Co Sat day do bon khon bat phan trang den. Sau do bao Truong Han cho co lo la, hay trong coi dia ban cho tot."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Tu Pham</color>,

Task.Title: Luoc Gia Trung Gioi 3/5
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Dai Tri Thien Su</color>,

Task.Title: Luoc Gia Trung Gioi 4/5
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Cam Quan Dai Tong</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Han</color>:"Co chuyen nay sao? Ta that dang chet, khong nho Trieu dai nhan thi gio da khong co ta, noi lai voi ong ay ta se can than hon."

Task.Title: Luoc Gia Trung Gioi 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Han</color>:"Noi voi ong ay ta se can than hon."
Task.DoingTalk: tim <color=#FFCC00>Trieu Thinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Trieu Thinh</color>:"Tot, doi voi bon xau phai nhu the!"

Task.Title: Tinh Hinh Nguy Cap 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: Den Duong Chau tim <color=#FFCC00>Long Nhat Hien</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Long Nhat Hien</color>:"Khong kip roi, phai lam sao bay gio..."

Task.Title: Tinh Hinh Nguy Cap 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Long Nhat Hien</color>:"Phan da Tao bang o Thai Thach co, Da chu Than Nhuoc Nien co on cuu mang ta. Thai Thach Co lai la trong dia cua Tao Bang. Neu co the bao tin cho Than Nhuoc Nien, ta vo cung cam kich!"
Task.DoingTalk: den phan da cua Tao Bang o Thai Thach Co bao tin tuc cho<color=#FFCC00>Than Nhuoc Nien</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Than Nhuoc Nien</color>:"Gan day ta cam thay co chuyen khong hay, so linh chiem dong o Thai Thach Co khong ngung tang len."

Task.Title: Tinh Hinh Nguy Cap 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Than Nhuoc Nien</color>:"So quan binh kia lau roi khong thao luyen, tham song so chet, nho dai hiep tap kich chung. Nhu the chung se hoang loan, ta cung de ha lenh cho huynh de tam thoi lanh nan."
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Thu Quan Lam An </color>.

Task.Title: Tinh Hinh Nguy Cap 4/5
Task.DoingTalk: da bai <color=#FFCC00>Vo Su Ma Bang</color>.

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Than Nhuoc Nien</color>:"Ta thay mat huynh de da ta, nguoi da so tan gan het, chi doi chung den tan cong la xong."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tat Thu Duong</color>:"Ta hien gio co viec lam phien dai hiep truong nghia tuong tro."

Task.Title: Thanh Ly Mon Ho 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tat Thu Duong</color>:"Quang thoi gian nay thong tin co mat cua bon bang khong ngung bi tiet lo. Ta dieu tra mui biet la do mot tay Mac Chu Nien lam."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Han Thuy Co Do tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Mac Chu Nien</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tat Thu Duong</color>:"Da ta. Mac Chu Nien cung that dang toi, nghe noi hanh tung cua Gia Vuong la do han tiet lo cho 3 ten quai vat o Am Son."

Task.Title: Do Uoc 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Duong Chau Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Long Nhat Hien</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Long Nhat Hien</color>:"Thoi gian sap den roi, chang le lan nay ta lai thua?"

Task.Title: Do Uoc 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Long Nhat Hien</color>:"Ta danh cuoc voi Truong Han, trong vong 3 ngay se lay Cam Quan Khai Giap cua han.Day chang phai tu lam kho minh sao....chi con mot ngay, xem ra ta thua roi..."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Han Son Co Sat giet <color=#FFCC00>Cam Quan Dai Tong</color>, nhan cam quan khai giap.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Long Nhat Hien</color>:"Haha. Da ta!"

Task.Title: Luyen Nhat Dai Phap 1/4

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dat Nhat A Xich</color>:"Lao nap tuoi tac da cao, nhung lai khong co do de, khong ai de truyen thu ban linh nay, qua la dang buon!"

Task.Title: Luyen Nhat Dai Phap 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dat Nhat A Xich</color>:"Van vat deu da co so, tat ca dua vao duyen so, vo duyen doi dien bat tuong phung, gap go con kho nhu vay noi chi den viec chon do de? Thi chu co muon thu khong?"

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dat Nhat A Xich</color>:"Kha lam! Lao nap khong nhin nham nguoi."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Coc Ninh Son</color>:"Con trai ta bi bat di sung quan,ta lai tung vi chuyen lam an ma xay ra hiem khach voi pho tuong quan doanh.neu khong bo tien ra thi con ta khong the ve nha."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguyet Anh Sa Khau</color>:"Truoc kia day von la noi nhu bong lai tien canh, tu khi mot so Hanh Cuoc Thuong phat hien o day co Kim Khoang, quan phu lien phai rat nhieu nguoi den day khai thac."

Task.Title: Hanh Dong Am Sat 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguyet Anh Sa Khau</color>:"Chung toi quyet dinh cu nguoi di am sat, nhung trong thon khong tim duoc cao thu. Neu dai hiep bang long tuong tro, chung toi se cam kich vo cung."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguyet Anh Sa Khau</color>:"Xin da ta, tuy 3 ten do da bi giet, nhung khong biet quan phu se doi voi chung ta the nao day, trong long chung ta van thap thom khong yen."

Task.Title: Danh Duoi Cuong Dao 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Han Thuy Co Do tim <color=#FFCC00>Tuong Tau</color>, nhan nhiem vu.

Task.Title: Danh Duoi Cuong Dao 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tuong Tau</color>:"Nha ta bi chiem roi, tuong cong ta lai bi bat di, sai nha khong quan tam, ta mot minh khong chon nuong than thi lam sao song tiep chu.....huhu..."

Task.Title: Binh Dinh Bien Gioi 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lam Dac Su</color>:"Bat luan la ai, chi can ra tay duoi Du Binh Tay Ha deu duoc trong thuong. Neu thich sat duoc thu linh du binh Dac Nhat Lac thi thuong gap boi."

Task.Title: Loi Noi Doi Thien Y 1/5

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Van Tieu Dao</color>:"Ta la Liep Ung Thu cua Khoai Dao Mon, nhan loi uy thac cua Tien Da Da cong tu cua Thanh Do Phu den day de lay mat bach xa."

Task.Title: Loi Noi Doi Thien Y 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Van Tieu Dao</color>:"Ta da lay duoc mat Bach Xa. Nguoi hay mang den cho ong noi Lang Hoa.
Task.DoingTalk: Den Giang Tan Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Lang Hoa gia gia</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ong Noi Lang Hoa</color>:"Lao gia nhu ta du co song toi 100 tuoi thi cung co lam duoc gi dau?"

Task.Title: Loi Noi Doi Thien Y 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ong Noi Lang Hoa</color>:"Hay den gap Canh Tu Tu Nhan."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thanh Do Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Canh Tu Tu Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Canh Tu Tu Nhan</color>:"..."

Task.Title: Loi Noi Doi Thien Y 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Canh Tu Tu Nhan</color>:"Hay giup ta 1 so viec."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dai Tan Quan tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ly A Dai</color>, roi bao cho lang hoa.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lang Hoa</color>:"Da ta da dua mat ran cho ong noi ta, ta nghi hien gio ong da khoe. Da ta da giup ta."

Task.Title: Loi Noi Doi Thien Y 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lang Hoa</color>:"Hay giup ta chuyen loi den Tien Da Da, neu co thoi gian co the qua nha ta choi."
Task.DoingTalk: tim <color=#FFCC00>Tien Da Da</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tien Da Da</color>:"Van Tieu Dao da noi cho ta biet het roi. That khong dam giau, day la lan dau ta duoc Lan Hoa co nuong moi. Ta nen mac trang phuc gi day...nen mang theo le vat gi day..."

Task.Title: Huyen Thuong Thong Cao 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thai Hanh Co Kinh tim <color=#FFCC00>Vuong Pho Tuong</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vuong Pho Tuong</color>:"Bon ta phung menh den day tran ap bon bao loan, nhung van khong hieu qua."

Task.Title: Huyen Thuong Thong Cao 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vuong Pho Tuong</color>:"Nay Tri phu dai nhan ra thong cao, ai ra tay ho tro tran ap bao dan se duoc trong thuong, nguoi co muon nhan thuong khong?"
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Vu Trang Thon Dan</color>,

Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Bao No Khoang Cong</color>,

Task.Title: Huyen Thuong Thong Cao 4/5

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vuong Pho Tuong</color>:"Nguoi rat xung dang duoc nhan thuong! De xem bon bao dan nay co con dam tac oai tac quai nua khong!"

Task.Title: Cuu Te Thon Dan 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thai Hanh Co Kinh tim <color=#FFCC00>Nguyet Anh Sa Khau</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguyet Anh Sa Khau</color>:"Sau khi quan binh den day, khong nhung tang cuong ha hiep, ma con nhieu lan cuop luong thuc va cua cai cua chung ta, gio chung ta da o vao duong cung roi!"

Task.Title: Cuu Te Thon Dan 2/3

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguyet Anh Sa Khau</color>:"..."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nguyet Anh Sa Khau</color>:"Chung ta cung khong co gi quy gia, chut long thanh xin nhan cho."

Task.Title: Ho Diep Mua Thu 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dai Ly Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Nam Cung Uyen Nhi</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nam Cung Uyen Nhi</color>:"Toi qua lai nam mo thay Tieu Diep, ca nguoi day mau, that dang so....Tieu Diep da mat tich nhieu ngay roi, cach xa nhieu nam moi doan tu that khong ngo bi xa cach lan nua..."

Task.Title: Ho Diep Mua Thu 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nam Cung Uyen Nhi</color>:" Neu nguoi that su muon giup, tieu nu cam kich vo cung. Gan day co mot ten cuop bi bat ten la Te Nac La, nguoi nay la khach cua Bi La Cac, hoi han nhat dinh biet duoc tin tuc cua Tieu Diep."
Task.DoingTalk: Den nha mon Dai Ly hoi tham <color=#FFCC00>Te Nac La</color>, ten cuop moi bi bat ve tung tich Tieu Diep
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Te Nac La</color>:"Roi co mot ngay co the ra ngoai nhat dinh se giet chet lao tac Dat Nhat A Xich."

Task.Title: Ho Diep Mua Thu 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Te Nac La</color>:"A ta chet roi."
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin Tieu Diep chet cho <color=#FFCC00>Nam Cung Uyen Nhi</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nam Cung Uyen Nhi</color>:"Ta biet ma...ta biet ma...Tieu Diep...huhu...ta biet con buom hang ngay ta hay chinh la Tieu Diep....Tieu Diep la mot co gai menh kho,."

Task.Title: Ho Diep Mua Thu 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nam Cung Uyen Nhi</color>:"Nguoi nhat dinh phai bao thu cho co ay, giet chet ten khon Bi La Cac, dung dau han te linh hon Tieu Diep...bao thu cho Tieu Diep...huhu..."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Nhi Hai Ma Nham tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Bi La Cac</color>, va lay thu cap mang ve.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nam Cung Uyen Nhi</color>:"Nhung thu bao boi nay do Tieu Diep suu tam thay mot vi hiep si, nay co ay da chet, ta tang no cho nguoi vay!"

Task.Title: Vuot Ai Bach Ho Duong
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Giang ho don rang, Diem Bang buon muoi rat giau. Tu khi chuong mon Tu Ban Kiem ke vi, lam tay sai cho trieu dinh. Bang chu doi truoc Diem Bang "Tuyet Giang Hai" Tieu Hien mat tich ky bi cho den nay. Nghe noi Tieu hien luc tai vi, ton 10 nam de da thong cac dau moi song Nam Bac, cau ket voi quan lai tu loi, de dang cho hang cua Diem Bang thong qua."
Task.DoingTalk: Den tan thu thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Tieu Hien mat tich, vay danh sach lien quan giua Diem Bang va tam giao cuu luu cung mat theo. Danh sach nay khong chi co ho ten nguoi lien quan, ma con co so sach cau ket cua quan lai va Tieu Hien, neu co duoc vat nay rat co loi cho ta."

Task.Title: Vuot Ai Bach Ho Duong
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Gan day co tin noi Tieu Hien bi thich khach ao trang thich sat tai Bach Ho Duong, Nguoi hay den do xem thu
Task.DoingTalk: Vao thanh thi tim <color=#FFCC00>Ho Ve Bach Ho Duong</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ho Ve Bach Ho Duong</color>:"Moi ngay vao khoang thoi gian nhat dinh co the den ghi danh, sau 30 phut hoat dong se bat dau, khong the ghi danh khi hoat dong da bat dau. Khi vao do se tu dong bat pk Gia Toc, Bang Hoi, moi tang deu co 1 Boss, tieu diet boss se xuat hien diem truyen tong vao tang tren, sau 30 phut hoat dong ket thuc.

Task.Title: Tuong Duong Lao Binh 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tuong Duong Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Tuong Duong Lao Binh</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tuong Duong Lao Binh</color>:"No phat xung quan, binh lan xu, tieu tieu vu yet. Nguong thien truong khieu, trang hoai kich liet."

Task.Title: Tuong Duong Lao Binh 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tuong Duong Lao Binh</color>:"Nguoi hay thu tham gia chien truong tong tim, xem su khoc liet ma ta phai chiu nam xua."
Task.DoingTalk: Doi thoai voi quan ghi danh Mong Co Tay Ha tham gia chien truong.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tuong Duong Lao Binh</color>:"

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Bo Dau</color>:"Hac Thuy Khinh Ky gan day thuong xuyen quay nhieu thon dan quanh vung."

Task.Title: Trong Thuong 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Bo Dau</color>:" Huyen lenh dai nhan tuc gian dua ra thuon vang cho ai tieu diet duoc chung. Neu nguoi co thuc luc thi bat chung mang lai day cho ta, vang thuong nhat dinh se khong it."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Hac Thuy Khinh Ky</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Bo Dau</color>:"Lam rat tot. Cua nguoi day!"

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>A Nac</color>:"Co chuyen muon nho dai hiep giup do, khong biet co the ra tay nghia hiep khong?"

Task.Title: Tam Hoi Quai Vat 2/3
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Tinh Binh O Bo Trai</color>, dang o do.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>A Nac</color>:"Day la tuong Kho Than gia."

Task.Title: Tam Hoi Quai Vat 3/3
