Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>A Nac</color>:"On nghia cua dai hiep, chung ta se luon ghi nho."

Task.Title: Trung Phat 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Diem Thuong Son tim <color=#FFCC00>A Nac</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>A Nac</color>:"Oi, ba vo ngay nao cung than khoc, phien chet di duoc!"

Task.Title: Trung Phat 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>A Nac</color>:"Em vo ta tren duong ve nha da bi bon xau lam nhuc, xau ho da nhay song tu van nen ngay nao vo ta cung rua mat bang nuoc mat...neu ai co the trung tri bon xau do thi nguoi trong son trai se vo cung cam kich."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Diem Thuong Son tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Hac Thuy Khinh Ky</color>,

Task.Title: Trung Phat 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Tinh Binh O Bo Trai</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Thi</color>:"That sao? Dai hiep dung la dai an nhan cua son trai! Tiec la em ta da mat, nhung du sao cung tra duoc tu roi...."

Task.Title: Hon Quan 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Diem Thuong Son tim <color=#FFCC00>Cap Ca</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cap Ca</color>:"Ta nhat dinh phai duoi ten cau tac Ly Ban Nguyen ra khoi Diem Thuong Son..."

Task.Title: Hon Quan 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cap Ca</color>:"Ten cau quan Ly Ban Nguyen nay, chet tram lan cung khong du. Dang tiec ta vo nghe khong gioi, sap thanh lai bai. Neu co the diet tru nan nay cho son trai ta, chung ta se rat cam kich."

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cap Ca</color>:

Task.Title: Hon Quan 3/3

Task.DoingTalk: tim <color=#FFCC00>Sinh Thiet Khoang Thach</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cap Ca</color>:"That la cam kich, ta nhat dinh se ca ngoi an duc cua nguoi!"

Task.Title: Gia Thu 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Diem Ho Khau Kiem Tri <color=#FFCC00>Tu So</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tu So</color>:"Ta la con trai cua Dai tuong Dai Tong Tu Hien, vi ca nha bi hai ma chay den day. Tu luc Hoang thuong dang co den nay, trong trieu bat dau co dai loan. Trieu Nhu Nhu y minh la Thua Tuong, be canh dau da, vi cha ta va y khong hop y, nen y da vu oan, tai hoa ap den nha ta, chi minh ta thoat duoc."

Task.Title: Gia Thu 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tu So</color>:"Dai hiep co the giup ta khong?"
Task.DoingTalk: Den Ho Khau Kiem Tri tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Tinh Ky Binh</color>,

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tu So</color>:"Da ta an duc cua dai hiep."

Task.Title: Tru Hai 1/2

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Mai Than Ong</color>:"Gan day xuat hien rat nhieu dieu ky quai."

Task.Title: Tru Hai 2/2

Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Nam De Tu Ta Giao</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Mai Than Ong</color>:"Thi ra la nhu vay..."

Task.Title: Dao Ly 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuc Nguu Son tim <color=#FFCC00>Ly Co Nap Tu</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly Co Nap Tu</color>:"Ngoc Anh la con gai trang chu Nham gia trang o gan day, to tien Nham gia deu lam nghe "dao tac mot chan"."

Task.Title: Dao Ly 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly Co Nap Tu</color>:"Ngoc Anh o Nham gia trang cach day khong xa ve phia Tay Nam, nguoi nha ho vo cung hung tan, nguoi phai can than."
Task.DoingTalk: di tim <color=#FFCC00>Nham Ngoc Anh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nham Ngoc Anh</color>:"........"

Task.Title: Dao Ly 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nham Ngoc Anh</color>:"Hien tai tat ca nam tu cua Nham gia da di ra ngoai het, chi con mot vai nu nhi o nha.Tuy nhien van phai danh bai lao To Mau, dai tau va co co."
Task.DoingTalk: Thuyet phuc <color=#FFCC00>Dai Co</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Co</color>:"Nguoi la ai? Sao lai xuat hien o day? Neu bi mau than va chau dau ta nhin thay thi khong hay dau."

Task.Title: Dao Ly 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Co</color>:"oi! Dua chau toi nghiep, nguoi di noi voi no, Dai Co se khong lam kho no, bao no cu yen tam! Con To Mau va Dai tau cua no thi phai luu y hieu hon. Neu that su khong duoc thi nan ni vai loi, tranh nguy hiem den tinh mang!"
Task.DoingTalk: Truyen loi toi <color=#FFCC00>Nham Ngoc Anh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nham Ngoc Anh</color>:"Su viec den nuoc nay khong con nghi duoc nhieu vay nua."

Task.Title: Binh Loan 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Ho Khau Kiem Tri tim <color=#FFCC00>Tan Khue</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tan Khue</color>:"Gan day nhan duoc cong van cua trieu dinh, don tru Cam Quan Bac Doanh va Cam Quan Nam Doanh o Ho Khau Kiem Tri co hanh vi tao phan, dang am muu lat do trieu dinh."

Task.Title: Binh Loan 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tan Khue</color>:"Trieu dinh dua cong van muon Van Tu Doanh ta khoi binh dep loan. Loan the dung trong dien, ta dang chieu mo nhan tai binh loan, khong biet nguoi co muon thu khong?"
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Cam Quan Bac Doanh</color>,

Task.Title: Binh Loan 3/3

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tan Khue</color>:"Nguoi lam rat tot! Trieu dinh nhat dinh se trong thuong."

Task.Title: Tim Ca Ca 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuc Nguu Son tim <color=#FFCC00>Ngan Vu Nap Tu</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngan Vu Nap Tu</color>:"Ta ten Ngan Vu Nap Tu, ca ca ten Kim Vu Nap Tu. Ca ca tu nho da bi Doanh Trai Gan day bat di, moi nguoi noi da bi chet roi."

Task.Title: Tim Ca Ca 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngan Vu Nap Tu</color>:"dai hiep co the giup ta khong?
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet<color=#FFCC00>Cam Quan Nam Doanh</color>,

Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ngan Vu Nap Tu</color>:"Sao khong tim duoc chut tin tuc nao a?. Du sao cung cam on dai hiep rat nhieu!"

Task.Title: Tu Ngoc Bang Xa 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Dung roi, co chuyen quan trong can nguoi lam!"

Task.Title: Tu Ngoc Bang Xa 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Nghe noi Huong Thuy Dong co Tu Ngoc Khoang Thach quy, mai no ra thanh bot tri vet thuong rat tot. COn co mot loai Bang xa, song gan Tu Ngoc, cung la mot duoc lieu quy. Bat Dong Tien sinh muon dung hai vat nay de mung tho Dai gia Truong Tram Kinh, nen den nho ta."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Huong Thuy Dong tim <color=#FFCC00>Bang Xa</color>, va bat no.

Task.Title: Tu Ngoc Bang Xa 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Nghe noi Huong Thuy Dong co Tu Ngoc Khoang Thach quy, mai no ra thanh bot tri vet thuong rat tot. COn co mot loai Bang xa, song gan Tu Ngoc, cung la mot duoc lieu quy. Bat Dong Tien sinh muon dung hai vat nay de mung tho Dai gia Truong Tram Kinh, nen den nho ta."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Huong Thuy Dong tim <color=#FFCC00>mach khoang Tu Ngoc</color>, va dao ve.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bat Dong Tien Sinh</color>:"Ai da! That tot qua! Truong lao dau se rat mung!"

Task.Title: Kim Khoang 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Co mot chuyen phai noi cho nguoi biet, cach day khong lau co huynh de nghia quan phat hien Kim khoang o Phuc Nguu Son, ta lien phai nguoi den do dao, muon dao mot it de tiep te cho nghia quan."

Task.Title: Kim Khoang 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Nghia quan duoc phai di do Dong Gia Du chi huy, den Phuc Nguu Son cung kha lau nhung khong thay tin tuc. Ta rat lo, bay gio khong co ai thich hop den do xem..."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuc Nguu Son tim <color=#FFCC00>Dong Gia Du</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dong Gia Du</color>:"Thu Di phai nguoi toi?"

Task.Title: Kim Khoang 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dong Gia Du</color>:"
Task.DoingTalk: Giet <color=#FFCC00>Gau Rong</color>,

Task.Title: Kim Khoang 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dong Gia Du</color>:"
Task.DoingTalk: Thu Thap <color=#FFCC00>Kim Khoang Thach</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Rat tot."

Task.Title: Cuu Han 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Ta Hien</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Hien</color>:"Nam no, khi Truong lao gia di ngao du, mot ten dao tac mot chan len vao, khong nhung lay het tai san trong nha ma con giet ca phu mau va vo con cua Truong Tram Kinh. Truong lao gia cuc kho tim kiem hung thu da lau nhung van chua tim ra."

Task.Title: Cuu Han 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Hien</color>:"Vai ngay truoc, mot vi lao bang huu cho ta biet tung tich cua ten dao tac do, hien han dang an nau o Huong Thuy Dong. Nguoi hay den do bat han, ta phai lay dau han lam le vat mung tho cho Truong lao gia."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Huong Thuy Dong giet ten dao tac mot chan <color=#FFCC00>Cam Thuong Ho</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Hien</color>:"Co nhu vay tam nguyen ca doi cua Tuong lao gia moi hoan thanh duoc."

Task.Title: Pho Uoc 1/7
Task.DoingTalk: Den Duong Mon tim <color=#FFCC00>Duong Nhu</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Nhu</color>:"Dai Hiep neu co thoi gian, hay giup ta den Bich Quang Thien Vien o Ho Khau Kiem Tri mot chuyen, Duong mo se hau ta!"

Task.Title: Pho Uoc 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Nhu</color>:"Nam nay Bich Quang Thien Su den Duong Mon, nhung ngay hen da qua ma van khong thay bong dang ong ta dau, nen muon nho nguoi den Bich Quang Thien Vien xem thu."
Task.DoingTalk: Duong Nhu lo lang chuyen cua <color=#FFCC00>Bich Quang Thien Su</color>, nho ta den Bich Quang Thien Vien xem thu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bich Quang Thien Su</color>:"May hom truoc co mot Phien tang ten Cach Tang Binh Tho den, luc dau con cung lao nap nghien cuu phat phap, sau do co chut ngang nguoc. Han biet ta khong luyen vo hoc, lai muon thi tho voi lao nap."

Task.Title: Pho Uoc 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bich Quang Thien Su</color>:"Ta noi khong duoc, han lai muon co o day an va. De tu lao nap ly luan voi han, bi chung dung vu luc uy hiep. Noi ra that xau ho, cac de tu deu khong co ai hoc vo nen chi biet nhin nhuc, lam sao con tam tinh di den noi hen."
Task.DoingTalk: Den gap <color=#FFCC00>Cach Tang Binh Tho</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cach Tang Binh Tho</color>:"Khau khi lon lam, coi chung gio lon lam dau luoi Cao thu Dai Tong bon toa gap khong it, chi co vai nguoi tai."

Task.Title: Pho Uoc 4/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cach Tang Binh Tho</color>:"Hai de tu cua bon toa du khien nguoi phai khiep so. Neu nguoi khong phuc co the dau voi chung, neu hai nguoi deu bai, ta se di ngay lap tuc."
Task.DoingTalk: Khieu chien <color=#FFCC00>Ma Am Co</color>,

Task.Title: Pho Uoc 5/7
Task.DoingTalk: Khieu chien <color=#FFCC00>Suu Hon Linh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Cach Tang Binh Tho</color>:"

Task.Title: Pho Uoc 6/7
Task.DoingTalk: Di bao cho <color=#FFCC00>Bich Quang Thien Su</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bich Quang Thien Su</color>:"A Di Da Phat! Lao nap dai dien chung tang da ta thi chu! "

Task.Title: Pho Uoc 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bich Quang Thien Su</color>:"Nho chuyen loi den Duong Nhu, doi lao nap thu xep xong, it ngay nwuax se den Duong Mon."
Task.DoingTalk: Chuyen loi cho <color=#FFCC00>Duong Nhu</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Duong Nhu</color>:"That tot qua!"

Task.Title: Tim Ngua 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Cu Dien Trach tim <color=#FFCC00>Ma Ba Lac</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Ba Lac</color>:"Lao phu la Tuong Ma Su noi tieng, Ma Truong rat lon va co tieng, kinh doanh phat dat. Tu khi ten cau tac Luong Hang Lam lam thu linh dong quan o day, nhung thang ngay tuoi dep cua lao cung het. Han y minh la thong linh nen ep gia ngua, no tien ngua."

Task.Title: Tim Ngua 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Ba Lac</color>:"Con ngua dau dan ma lao phu thuong nhat bi chung lam cho giat minh, khong biet chay di dau roi, do la mang song cua ta! Bay gio ngua da mat het, ta song sao day..."
Task.DoingTalk: ngua bi cuop di, tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ho Ky Hoanh Son</color>, nhan Hoang Thong Ma.

Task.Title: Tim Ngua 3/4
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ung Ky Hoanh Son</color>, nhan Tu Thong Ma.

Task.Title: Tim Ngua 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ngua Chua</color>, nhan Ngua Chua.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Ba Lac</color>:"Dung la ngua cua ta roi, con co ngua dau dan nua, lao phu that cam ta nguoi!"

Task.Title: Lao Mac Nhi 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: Den Cu Dien Trach tim <color=#FFCC00>Tieu Anh</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tieu Anh</color>:"Khi nguoi di qua Ho Khau Tran co gap Dai Mac Nhi va Tieu Mac Nhi khong? Ta la Co cua ho! Hai dua that ngo nghich, luon gay hoa cho ta, nhung Lao Mac Nhi cha cua chung la nguoi tai gioi.

Task.Title: Lao Mac Nhi 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tieu Anh</color>:"Lao Mac Nhi khong phai la anh ruot, chi la nghia huynh cua ta.Ong ta len Phuc Nguu Son hai thuoc, neu nguoi gap, hay bao ong ta ve nha."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuc Nguu Son tim <color=#FFCC00>Lao Mac Nhi</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lao Mac Nhi</color>:"Dai hiep hay cuu ta, ta con con nho o nha."

Task.Title: Lao Mac Nhi 3/5
Task.DoingTalk: <color=#FFCC00>Lao Mac Nhi</color>bi bat giu, nho ban doat lai Bach Thao Pho tu tay<color=#FFCC00>Chu Dai Bang</color>

Task.Title: Lao Mac Nhi 4/5
Task.DoingTalk: doat lai Do Ach kim Cham tu tay<color=#FFCC00>Ly Cau</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lao Mac Nhi</color>:"Da ta."

Task.Title: Lao Mac Nhi 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lao Mac Nhi</color>:"Nho nguoi chuyen loi toi Bach Thu Lam, sau nay co viec gi can lao giup cu noi."
Task.DoingTalk: Ve Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Lao Mac Nhi... Le nao nguoi noi la Mac Nhi? truoc day nghia quan chung ta da tung bi dich benh may nho co ong ta cuu giup. Xem ra day la y troi, neu khong ong ta se khong duoc nghia quan chung ta cuu."

Task.Title: Tieu Mac Nhi 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Cu Dien Trach tim <color=#FFCC00>Dai Mac Nhi</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Mac Nhi</color>:"Tren Duong di dai hiep co thay mot thieu nien tay cam thuong khong?"

Task.Title: Tieu Mac Nhi 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Mac Nhi</color>:"No bo nha di. Ta muon ra ngoai tim nhung lai so no ve nha nen doi o day. Neu dai hiep khong ban viec thi giup ta tim em trai ve duoc khong?"
Task.DoingTalk: khuyen <color=#FFCC00>Tieu Mac Nhi</color>, quay ve.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tieu Mac Nhi</color>:" Ta chi muon di choi chut thoi ma."

Task.Title: Tieu Mac Nhi 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tieu Mac Nhi</color>:" Hay bao anh Dai Mac Nhi dung lo, ta se ve nha ngay."
Task.DoingTalk: quay ve bao tin cho <color=#FFCC00>Dai Mac Nhi</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Mac Nhi</color>:"Ta on troi dat! Da ta! Neu khong cha ma ve se danh ta chet mat!"

Task.Title: Tan Lang Tuu 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Cu Dien Trach tim <color=#FFCC00>Lao Tuy Dau</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lao Tuy Dau</color>:"Vi khach quan nay den tu oc dao phia tay nam sao? Ta se mua Tan Lang Cot voi gia cao."

Task.Title: Tan Lang Tuu 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lao Tuy Dau</color>:"Tan Lang Tuu la loai ruou ta luon muon u duoc. Nhung Tan Lang Cot rat kho tim, nghe noi oc dao phia tay nam thuong xuat hien Tan Lang nen lao phu moi ra gia cao voi thuong khach de mua Tan Lang Cot. Neu nguoi lay duo no, ta se hau ta!"
Task.DoingTalk: nghe noi <color=#FFCC00>oc dao</color>, o phia Tay Nam thuong co Tan Lang Cot xuat hien
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lao Tuy Dau</color>:"Da ta nguoi, day la phan thuong hay nhan lay."

Task.Title: Mua Di Ban Lai 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Cu Dien Trach tim <color=#FFCC00>Van Dai Dao</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Van Dai Dao</color>:"Ngui muon nhan vu lam an lon khong? Neu thanh cong bao dam nguoi giau to."

Task.Title: Mua Di Ban Lai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Van Dai Dao</color>:"Neu muon lam thi hay di tieu diet bon Ma Tac trong sao huyet. Co dau lau trong tay Ky Thu cua chung, con Phuc Long Thao thi phai xem van may cua nguoi."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ho Ky Hoanh Son</color>, nhan Phuc Long Thao

Task.Title: Mua Di Ban Lai 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Van Dai Dao</color>:"Neu muon lam thi hay di tieu diet bon Ma Tac trong sao huyet. Co dau lau trong tay Ky Thu cua chung, con Phuc Long Thao thi phai xem van may cua nguoi."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ung Ky Hoanh Son</color>, nhan Co Dau Lau.Dem den cho <color=#FFCC00>Lang Hoa</color> o Thanh Do Phu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Lang Hoa</color>:"O chang le mui tren co the nguoi la Phuc long Thao? Ban cho ta di, ta se ra gia cao de mua no."

Task.Title: Canh Chung 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuong Tuong Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Tuan Kiem Su</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tuan Kiem Su</color>:"Dung nhu loi Quan Vuong, tu sau khi Ly Thang Duong tro ve, si binh cua han lai cang kho khong che hon truoc."

Task.Title: Canh Chung 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tuan Kiem Su</color>:"Nguoi hay giup ta day cho chung mot bai hoc de chung nho lau hon, cung de cho Ly Thang Duong kieng ne, quan ly bo ha cua han chat hon."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Me Cung Sa Mac day cho thuoc ha cua Ly Thang Duong la <color=#FFCC00>Hac Thuy Khoai Ky Binh</color>,

Task.Title: Canh Chung 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Me Cung Sa Mac day cho thuoc ha cua Ly Thang Duong la <color=#FFCC00>Than Ti Cung</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tuan Kiem Su</color>:"Viec nay khong duoc tiet lo ra ngoai!"

Task.Title: Luan Hoi 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Cuu Nghi Khe tim <color=#FFCC00>Thach Bai</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bia Da</color>:"Muoi nam truoc, Du va cac su huynh de bi truc xuat khoi Thien Truc Thien Hoa Tu, luu lac den day. Sau do dai su huynh duoi den day, doi giao ra That Bao Xa Loi cua su to de lai. Du lieu mang bao ve, cac vi su huynh de lan luot chet het, Du cung bi trong thuong ma chet."

Task.Title: Luan Hoi 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bia Da</color>:"Ta chet khong tiec, nhung Xa Loi roi vao tay ac do, chet khong nham mat. Suc cung luc kiet khong the chon cat dong mon. Chi mong co nguoi thuong xot chung ta, ma hoa tang, xin van ta.
Task.DoingTalk: nguyen di tim cac <color=#FFCC00>hai cot tang nhan Thien Truc</color>, ve cho <color=#FFCC00>Huyen Tu Phuong Truong</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00>Huyen Tu Phuong Truong</color>:"A Di Da Phat, thi chu that co tam long bo tat, Phat To se phu ho."

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 1/6
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Sau khi Gia Vuong dang co tro thanh Hoang De, trong trieu bat dau tien hanh mot dot thanh tru, dan da da tro thanh cuoc tranh dau giua cac quyen than. Cac trieu than lan luot bi truc xuat khoi trieu dinh, Phuong Trong Sinh cung khong thoat khoi."

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Phuong Trong Sinh la thanh quan hiem co, nhieu lan am tham giup do Nghia Quan ta. Han Thac Tru tung co giao hao voi ta, nen ta dinh nho nguoi den cau xin han, xin han khoan hong, dung lam kho Phuong Trong Sinh nua."
Task.DoingTalk: Phuong Trong Sinh nhieu lan dac toi Han Thac Tru, Bach Thu Lam lo so tren duong di day se bi am hai, nho ta den Lam An xin<color=#FFCC00>Han Thac Tru</color>, khoan hong
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Han Thac Tru</color>:"Phuong Trong Sinh? Ta von khong dinh tinh toan voi han, chi luu day den Tu Qua Doanh de han suy nghi, cac nguoi da den day xin cho han thi ta se tha han di."

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Han Thac Tru</color>:"Tu Qua Doanh nam o Thuc Cuong Son ben ngoai Duong Chau Thanh, Dai tuong quan Tat Toan o do la cuu bo cua ta, nguoi chi can noi ten ta ra la dc."
Task.DoingTalk: Phuong Trong Sinh hien bi giam o Tu Qua Doanh o Thuc Cuong. Dai Tuong quan o do la <color=#FFCC00>Tat Toan</color>, phu trach moi viec o do.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tat Toan</color>:"Phuong Trong Sinh? Chi so han khong the roi khoi day, vai ngay truoc han bi doc trung can, vet thuong ngay cang nghiem trong."

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tat Toan</color>:"Quan y noi vung Dong Nam co mot loai Thanh Doc Thao co the tri cho han. Nhung o do co rat nhieu ran, khong ai dam di. Nguoi muon cuu han, truoc het phai tim thay Thanh Doc Thao."
Task.DoingTalk: di hai <color=#FFCC00>Thanh Doc Thao</color>, dem ve cho quan y <color=#FFCC00>Do Tan</color> dieu che thuoc giai.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tan</color>:"Duoc, nguoi doi mot lat!"

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Phuong Trong Sinh</color>:"Ta khong sao roi. Xin chuyen loi voi thu linh nguoi, Phuong Trong Sinh khong bao gio quen on cuu mang nay."
Task.DoingTalk: ve bao cho <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Oi... Trieu dinh luc nao moi co the yen on that su day..."

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thuc Cuong Son tim <color=#FFCC00>Do Tan</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tan</color>:"Thoi gian nay mua lon lien mien, nuoc gieng bi mua lon van duc, sinh ra mot so tieu doc trung. Nguoi uong phai nuoc gieng nay se bi tieu chay, dau don vo cung."

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tan</color>:"Ta nho o Tien Cuc Dong co mot loai Han Diem hiem thay,co tac dung lam sach nuoc, con co the giet chet tieu doc trung trong nuoc. Neu co the dem ve it Han Diem, nhung nguoi nay khong phai chiu kho nua."
Task.DoingTalk: Den gan Tien Cuc Dong tim <color=#FFCC00>Han Diem</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tan</color>:"Tot roi"

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tan</color>:"Hay di bao cho Tat Toan
Task.DoingTalk: Den bao cho <color=#FFCC00>Tat Toan</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tat Toan</color>:"That sao? Do tien sinh qua la tai gioi!"

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den tu biet <color=#FFCC00>Do Tan</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tan</color>:"Lan nay may ma co nguoi tuong tro, ta thay mat moi nguoi o day da ta nguoi."

Task.Title: Khoi Thong 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuong Tuong Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Phi Si Tuong</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Phi Si Tuong</color>:"Nghe Ly Thang Duong duong chu dot ngot quay ve, ai cung tranh nhau tang le vat de gianh duoc thien cam cua ong ta."

Task.Title: Khoi Thong 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Phi Si Tuong</color>:"Nghe noi Ly Thang Duong bi nhiem han doc. Ta nghe su phu noi co loai Hoa Thi Vu ky sinh tren co the nguoi chet, giai han doc cuc tot, chung chi moc o bai tha ma Me Cung Sa Mac. Hay giup ta di lay no."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Me Cung Sa Mac tim <color=#FFCC00>Hoa Thi Vu</color>, dem cho <color=#FFCC00>Ly Thang Duong</color> o Tay Ha Nhat Pham Duong.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly Thang Duong</color>:"Phi tong tieu dau dung la co long, rat nhieu le vat duoc dua den nhung duy chi co mon nay la hop y ta."

Task.Title: Khoi Thong 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly Thang Duong</color>:"Phien chuyen loi voi Phi tong tieu dau, sau nay co viec gi thi cu tim ta."
Task.DoingTalk: quay ve tim <color=#FFCC00>Phi Si Tuong</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Phi Si Tuong</color>:"Sau nay ta khong con phai lo gi nua roi."

Task.Title: Thich Khach 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dai Ly Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Ta Man Dinh</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Man Dinh</color>:"Ta muon nho nguoi dem mon an nay cho thich khach bi nhot trong nha lao, sau khi hoan thanh se hau ta. Nhung viec nay phai giu bi mat. Neu nguoi lam duoc thi den tim ta lay mon an dem cho han!"

Task.Title: Thich Khach 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Man Dinh</color>:"Duoc, nguoi hay dem thuc an nay cho thich khach bi bat trong nguc, la mon an han thich. Sau khi han an xong, nguoi ve tim ta."
Task.DoingTalk: Mang thuc an den dai lao cho <color=#FFCC00>thich khach bi giam</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Thich Khach Bi Bat</color>:"O! Day la banh to ta thich nhat, da ta nguoi, nguoi tot qua!"

Task.Title: Thich Khach 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve gap <color=#FFCC00>Ta Man Dinh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ta Man Dinh</color>:"Cam tien thuong di mau, dung o day, coi chung bi nguoi ta phat hien."

Task.Title: Te Song 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Ke Quan Dong tim <color=#FFCC00>Tam Bang Tu</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tam Bang Tu</color>:"Bon nguoi Dao Nhat Thien Giao nay gat lao tu den noi day, khong ngo mang ta lam vat te than. Cung may ta bi xep cuoi cung, nhan co hoi nay dao thong dao chon di."

Task.Title: Te Song 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tam Bang Tu</color>:" Moi han nay nuot khong troi, neu co nguoi thay ta xoa so dam ta giao nay, lao tu se dang tang tat ca bao boi cua nhung nguoi da chet."
Task.DoingTalk: Giup han trung tri <color=#FFCC00>Nam De Tu Ta Giao</color>.

Task.Title: Te Song 3/4
Task.DoingTalk: Giup han trung tri <color=#FFCC00>Nu De Tu Ta Giao</color>.

Task.Title: Te Song 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: Giup han trung tri <color=#FFCC00>Boc Su Ta Giao</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Tam Bang Tu</color>:"Rat tot, tang nguoi mon qua nay."

Task.Title: Diet Sach Bao Thu 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Cuu Nghi Khe tim <color=#FFCC00>Moc La Sam</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Moc La Sam</color>:"Di di! Ta han tan xuong tuy dam giang ho cac nguoi, dung den gan ta, neu khong ta se lieu mang voi nguoi."

Task.Title: Diet Sach Bao Thu 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Moc La Sam</color>:"Nguoi noi khong phai cung mot phe, vay duoi het bon Kiem Khach Giang Ho va Dao Khach Giang Ho vo danh kia di, roi giet chet bon Cao Thu Dai Noi mat nhan tinh kia bao thu cho dan thon ta."
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Dao Khach Giang Ho</color>,

Task.Title: Diet Sach Bao Thu 3/4
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Kiem Khach Giang Ho</color>,

Task.Title: Diet Sach Bao Thu 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Dai Noi Mat Tham</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Moc La Sam</color>:"Nguoi...."

Task.Title: Dai An Tu Mau Hoan 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Bien Kinh tim <color=#FFCC00>Coc Nam</color>, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Coc Nam</color>:"Neu ngay mai van khong tim thay Tu Mau Hoan, cac huynh de phai uong mang roi."

Task.Title: Dai An Tu Mau Hoan 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Coc Nam</color>:"Gan day trong nuoc noi len mot to chuc goi la Anh Tu Hoi, nghe noi trong do co doi Da Thu Tao Bang chuyen cuop ky bao roi lai ban di. Ta nghi Tu Mau Hoan chac chan bi chung cuop di roi."
Task.DoingTalk: Den can cu bi mat <color=#FFCC00>Da Thu Tao Bang</color>, o Phong Lang Do doat lay Tu Mau Hoan.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Coc Nam</color>:"Dung la Tu Mau Hoan! Lan nay huynh de cua ta duocc cuu roi."

Task.Title: Hoang Lang 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dai Ly Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Vu Thanh Phong</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vu Thanh Phong</color>:"Tu khi Hoang Thuong dua my nhan La Tuyet ve thi suot ngay chi o hau cung, buong long viec trieu chinh, dan den su bat man cua dai than va quy toc trong nuoc."

Task.Title: Hoang Lang 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vu Thanh Phong</color>:"Co mot so nguoi bat man voi Hoang thuong se nhan co hoi nay lat do, tuy cach nay nghi that tuc cuoi, nhung than tu chung ta cung phai de cao canh giac. Nguoi co the den Hoang Lang Doan Thi Tim Ho Kinh Huy tham thinh chung da bat dau hanh dong hay chua."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang Lang Doan Thi tim <color=#FFCC00>Ho Kinh Huy</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ho Kinh Huy</color>:"Dam nguoi nay that khong biet dang muon gi. Chung mua chuoc Tho Bo Toc Nhan phu trach sua chua, muon pha hoai phong thuy va co quan noi day, that la lieu linh."

Task.Title: Hoang Lang 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ho Kinh Huy</color>:"Nguoi da den day, thi hay cho chung biet tay,"
Task.DoingTalk: di giao huan bon <color=#FFCC00>Tho Bo Toc Nhan</color>,

Task.Title: Hoang Lang 4/5
Task.DoingTalk: di giao huan bon <color=#FFCC00>Tho Bo Boc Su</color>,

Task.Title: Hoang Lang 5/5
Task.DoingTalk: Bao cho <color=#FFCC00>Vu Thanh Phong</color> tinh hinh su viec.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Vu Thanh Phong</color>:"Bon ac tac nay, uong cong ta ne tinh voi chung, lai lam ra chuyen ton hai am duc nay. Lan nay nhat dinh khong the tha cho chung!"

Task.Title: Nghia Chi So Tai 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kiem Mon Quan tim <color=#FFCC00>Nhiep Va Thanh</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nhiep Van Thanh</color>:"Kiem Mon Quan nam o bien gioi Dai Tong va Tay Ha, la noi cac binh gia tranh gianh nhau. Do hai phia deu khong chiu nhuong nhin dan den chien tranh lien mien, nguoi chiu kho chinh la dan chung."

Task.Title: Nghia Chi So Tai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nhiep Van Thanh</color>:" Ta muon nho nguoi hay day cho bon Hac Thuy Van Ky Binh dam dot nhap lanh tho Dai Tong mot tran, nguoi thay the nao?"
Task.DoingTalk: Di giao huan <color=#FFCC00>Hac Thuy Van Ky Binh</color>,

Task.Title: Nghia Chi So Tai 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ho Quan Thiet Ky Binh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Nhiep Van Thanh</color>:"

Task.Title: Luu Khau Chi Phong 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang Hac Lau tim <color=#FFCC00>Diep Phieu Phieu</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diep Phieu Phieu</color>:"Tu khi den day chung ta moi phat hien noi nay khong yen on, Linh dao ngu cua mot doi quan tro thanh luu khau, tren duong chung con thu nhan them dan ngheo va tho phi, the luc cang lon."

Task.Title: Luu Khau Chi Phong 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diep Phieu Phieu</color>:"Khong nhung tap ket o day cuop boc ba tanh ma con danh du kich chien voi quan binh. Neu nguoi co hoi gian thi hay giup ba tanh diet tru chung."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Luu Khau</color>,

Task.Title: Luu Khau Chi Phong 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Luu Vong Dao Binh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Diep Phieu Phieu</color>:"Tot lam, hom nay den day duoc roi."

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: Den Long Mon thach quat tim <color=#FFCC00>Thu dai su</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Thu Dai Su</color>:"Nguoi hanh tau giang ho da lau, chac da tung nghe den Anh Tu Hoi, nhung nguoi nay gan day da chiem cu phia nam cua Chan Ngon Tu, khong biet la co muu do gi."

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Thu Dai Su</color>:"Nguoi hay den do tim hieu, cho du y do cua chung la gi thi cung phai doc het suc duoi chung ra khoi do. Ta an cu o day khong muon viec tu hanh bi chung quay nhieu."
Task.DoingTalk: Theo loi cua Thu dai su, danh duoi <color=#FFCC00>Bang Chung Anh Hoi</color>,

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 3/5
Task.DoingTalk: danh duoi <color=#FFCC00>Cam Ve Quan Dai Kim</color>,

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 4/5
Task.DoingTalk: danh duoi <color=#FFCC00>Phi Ky Binh Dai Kim</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Thu Dai Su</color>:"Neu Anh Tu Hoi da truy duoi den day, chac rang thuong kho dang o day."

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Thu Dai Su</color>:"Hay dem tin nay bao cho Thu Lam, nho y cho nguoi den tim, neu tim duoc cung la mot viec tot."
Task.DoingTalk: Ve Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Nguoi lam tot lam."

Task.Title: Than Ban Nguy Co 1/5
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Gan day nghe noi Tu Ban Kiem cau ket voi mot bon nhieu su tu tap o Bang Nguyen Bi Dong ben ngoai Long Tuyen Thon dinh chong doi chung ta, noi do rat gan nghia quan, ta khong the khong de phogf."

Task.Title: Than Ban Nguy Co 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Ta da phai Loi Lao Cuu den do do tham, nguoi hay cho chung nem mui de chung tu rut lui."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Bang Nguyen Bi Dong tim <color=#FFCC00>Loi Lao Cuu</color>,

Task.Title: Than Ban Nguy Co 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Loi Lao Cuu</color>:"Lu cuong do nay dam chong doi nghia quan ta, tu xung nghia si ma khong biet chung chi bi nguoi khac loi dung. Nguoi phai cho chung nem mui de chung tu bo y dinh."
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Giang Nam Nghia Si</color>,

Task.Title: Than Ban Nguy Co 4/5
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Dong Nam Nghia Si</color>,

Task.Title: Than Ban Nguy Co 5/5
Task.DoingTalk: danh bai <color=#FFCC00>Giang Bac Nghia Si</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Trong giang ho mang duoc yeu thua, de chung kieng de nghia quan ta la tot. Nhung lam nguoi khong nen qua ngang nguoc, neu khong se co nhieu ke thu!"

Task.Title: Hoang Lang Bi Su 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuong Tuong Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Hac Phong</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hac Phong</color>:"Ta thay nguoi giong con nha vo, co mot viec bi mat muon nguoi lam, xong viec se co thuong."

Task.Title: Hoang Lang Bi Su 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hac Phong</color>:"Gan day co mot vat tuyet mat xuat phat tu Hoang Lang Tay Ha, vat nay co quan he nhieu voi ta, ta nhat dinh phai co duoc. Neu nguoi lay duoc vat nay ta se trong thuong."
Task.DoingTalk: Vao trong Hoang Lang Tay Ha tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Hoang Lang Khan Thu/color>,

Task.Title: Hoang Lang Bi Su 3/4
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Dao Thu Phan Quan</color>,

Task.Title: Hoang Lang Bi Su 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Con Dao Thu</color>, Nhan Thu dan bang sap
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hac Phong</color>:"Khong sai, chinh la no! Dam ngu ngoc truoc day deu khong tim duoc no, xem ra nguoi la ke gioi nhat, sau nay co viec can phai nho den nguoi!"

Task.Title: Giai Cuu Su Phu 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kiem Mon Quan tim <color=#FFCC00>Sai Dinh</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Sai Dinh</color>:"Su phu trong nui da bi vay may ngay, phai lam sao day?"

Task.Title: Giai Cuu Su Phu 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Sai Dinh</color>:"Ta dinh tim nguoi giup su phu, khong biet dai hiep giup duoc chang?"
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Thu Quan Kiem Mon</color>,

Task.Title: Giai Cuu Su Phu 3/4
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Ho Quan Thiet Ky Binh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Sai Dinh</color>:"Hay qua!"

Task.Title: Giai Cuu Su Phu 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Sai Dinh</color>:"Day la thuc an chay chung ta vua chuan bi, phien nguoi dua den cho Hue Minh Thien Su, Sai Dinh vo cung cam kich."
Task.DoingTalk: Mang thuc an den cho <color=#FFCC00>Hue Minh Thien Su</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hue Minh Thien Su</color>:"A DI Da Phat noi co nhan at co qua, xem ra tu muoi may nam truoc da dinh san se co ngay nay!"

Task.Title: Son Mon Nan 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kiem Mon Quan tim <color=#FFCC00>Hue Minh Thien Su</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hue Minh Thien Su</color>:"A Di Da Phat, thi chu co the dua tin den cho Dai Gioi thien su o Dai Ly Doan Thi giup lao tang khong?"

Task.Title: Son Mon Nan 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hue Minh Thien Su</color>:"Bon Hac Thuy Ky Binh den bao vay tu vien. Lao tang tung phai nguoi cau vien nhung deu bi chung can lai. Hom nay xin nho thi chu tuong tro!"
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dai Ly tim <color=#FFCC00>Dai Gioi thien su</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Gioi Thien Su</color>:"A Di Da Phat! Ta co nghe tieng xau cua ke nay nhung khong ngo han ngang nguoc den vay."

Task.Title: Son Mon Nan 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Gioi Thien Su</color>:"Nhan voi Hue Minh su huynh rang ta nhat dinh giup huynh ay. Truoc khi ta den noi mong thi chu giup duoi Hac Thuy Ky Binh.)
Task.DoingTalk: Ve Hoa Sinh Tu duoi <color=#FFCC00>Hac Thuy Van Ky Binh</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Hue Minh Thien Su</color>:"Nguoi xuat gia khong noi doi, neu thien su da noi vay thi at se den, chung ta cu kien nhan cho doi."

Task.Title: Do Nha Chi Thac 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kiem Mon Quan tim <color=#FFCC00>Do Nha</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Nha</color>:"Lan truoc co nguoi cho ta biet sau khi bi thuong tam than Co co nuong rat bat on, noi xong nguoi do voi va di ngay nen ta khong kip hoi ro."

Task.Title: Do Nha Chi Thac 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Nha</color>:"Ta nho Ma Ma Nhi dai ca co 1 loai Yen Mat than ky ten Thanh Tam Yen, sau khi dung co the khien tam than thu thai. Nguoi co the lay mot it ve cho Co co nuong, san tien cho co nuong ay biet tin cua ta va A Bo khong?"
Task.DoingTalk: tim <color=#FFCC00>Ma Ma Nhi</color>, xin mot it Thanh Tam Yen Mat cho Co Yen Nhien
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ma Ma Nhi</color>:"Ra la Do co nuong nho nguoi den a? Duoc thoi, hay cam lay!"

Task.Title: Do Nha Chi Thac 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: Lay duoc Thanh Tam Yen Mat, mang den cho <color=#FFCC00>Co Yen Nhien</color>, o Hoang Hac Lau
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Yen Nhien</color>:"Tot qua...Cam on nguoi...."

Task.Title: Cuu Ai So Tai 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang Hac Lau tim <color=#FFCC00>Co Yen Nhien</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Yen Nhien</color>:"May nam truoc ta cung Hoan Nhan Tuong pha huy mot hang dong, cuu thoat mot co gai ten Do nha va mot dua tre vua tron thang, ta dat ten cho no la A Bo."

Task.Title: Cuu Ai So Tai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Yen Nhien</color>:"Xa nhieu nam, ta bong nhien muon biet tinh hinh cua ho, nguoi co the giup ta khong?"
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kiem Mon Quan tim <color=#FFCC00>Do Nha</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Nha</color>:"May ngay truoc quan su di qua nha ta, thay A Bo tu chat thong minh, lien nhan no lam de tu. Nhung ta khi tren mat vi quan su nay, va nhung viec han lam rat quai la so voi nguoi thuong, ta lam sao dam de A Bo di cung chung."

Task.Title: Cuu Ai So Tai 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Nha</color>:"Ta tung den noi o cua quan su tim A Bo, bi chung duoi ve. Ta ngay dem mong Co co nuong, giup ta mang A Bo tro ve...huhu.."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoang Hac Lau tim <color=#FFCC00>Co Yen Nhien</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Co Yen Nhien</color>:"Cam on nguoi....ta se khan truong!"

Task.Title: Tinh Y Mien Man 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Kiem Mon Quan tim <color=#FFCC00>Le Mo</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Le Mo</color>:"Ta va Dai Trang ca la thanh mai truc ma da dinh uoc tu nho, gio cha ta lai che nha Dai Trang ca ngheo khong muon ga ta cho chang. Dai Trang ca trong luc tuc gian da den Dai Ly Thanh de kiem tien.""

Task.Title: Tinh Y Mien Man 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Le Mo</color>:"Von ta muon hai mot it Tien Mat Qua de cho ca ban lay tien nhung lai bi cha ta vut het. Phu than tinh tinh co chap, neu khong co du sinh le thi se nhat dinh khong ga ta cho Trang ca. Nguoi co the giup ta?"
Task.DoingTalk: di hai <color=#FFCC00>Tien Mat Qua</color>,dem den cho Dai Trang o Dai Ly Phu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Trang</color>:"A...ta biet roi, ta nhat dinh khong phu long nang."

Task.Title: Tinh Y Mien Man 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Trang</color>:"Neu co den Kiem Mon Quan hay noi giup ta, bao nang hay doi ta, nhat dinh ta se quay ve lay nang."
Task.DoingTalk: chuyen loi cua Dai Trang toi <color=#FFCC00>Le Mo</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Le Mo</color>:"Da ta, ve sau ta va Dai Trang thanh than, nho den uong ruou mung."

Task.Title: Dich Nhan Chi Huu 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Tu sau khi Ly Thang Duong tro ve Tay Ha, su can bang thuc luc cua Tay Ha dot nhien thay doi. Ung Hoang Phai do Ly Thang Duong dung dau va Tan Chinh Phai do ly An Toan dung dau do bat dong chinh kien, hai ben dau da khong ngung."

Task.Title: Dich Nhan Chi Huu 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Viec nay thi chua ro nhung quan su qua co Thanh Phong tien sinh cua Ly Thang Duong chac chan biet noi tinh, ta biet de tu than can cua y la Do Tu Dan dang o trong Chan Ngon Tu tai Long Mon Thach Quat, nguoi hay di hoi han xem sao."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Long Mon Thach Quat tim <color=#FFCC00>Do Tu Dan</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tu Dan</color>:"Su Phu ta noi chi co cho Ly An Toan loi ich hau hinh thi moi yen duoc, neu khong thi han se lam phan, su phu cung tiet lo rang cai chet cua Viet Vuong co quan he chat che voi Ly Thang Duong."

Task.Title: Dich Nhan Chi Huu 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Do Tu Dan</color>:"Su phu co de lai mot buc di chuc dang o trong tay cua that muoi."
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Phi Ky Binh Dai Kim</color>, sau khi doat duoc di thu, mang den cho <color=#FFCC00>Ly An Toan</color>, o Phuong Tuong Phu.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Ly An Toan</color>:"Thanh Phong tien sinh? DI thu cua y sao lai dua cho bon vuong xem?...Viec nay... hay cho tac tu... ta the khong doi troi chung voi nguoi!"

Task.Title: Dich Nhan Chi Huu 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: Ly An Toan xem xong thu so toat mo hoi, xem ra Tay Ha da bat dau phat sinh noi chien. Co the ve gap <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, phuc menh roi!
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Nhu vay cang tot, Ly Thang Duong phen nay se ban ron day!"

Task.Title: Khieu Son Chan Ho 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Tu Ban Kiem nhieu lan buc bach, muon doat Du Long Giac ta da khong ni, lai con lenh cho bang chung den Dao Huong Thon gay han, that dang cam gian!"

Task.Title: Khieu Son Chan Ho 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Phai day cho han bai hoc, neu khong se khinh thuong nghia quan ta. Nguoi cu di den Tien Cuc Dong, bon Diem Bang o do la ngang tang nhat, ngoai ra con co bon dong luu o hop Bac Ma, hay de cho chung biet loi hai cua nghia quan ta."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tien Cuc Dong tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Bang Chung Diem Bang</color>,

Task.Title: Khieu Son Chan Ho 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Bang Chung Bac Ma</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Tot Lam! Hom nay da beu xau nhau roi thi chung ta cung khong can ne mat han nua."

Task.Title: Sat Thu Sa Dam 1/2
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Truong Tram Kinh</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"Nghe Thu Lam noi nguoi phat hien trong Tien Cuc Dong co manh moi cua mat Mang Xa."

Task.Title: Sat Thu Sa Dam 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"Nguoi co the den do lay it mat cua chung ve cho ta khong? Mat ran la duoc lieu quy, chi tiec khong de tim."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tien Cuc Dong tim giet <color=#FFCC00>Kho Cong</color>, doat lay mat.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Truong Tram Kinh</color>:"De ta xem nao, dung la khong it! Vat va cho nguoi qua!"

Task.Title: Co Nhan Chi Tinh 1/3
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tan Thu Thon tim <color=#FFCC00>Bach Thu Lam</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Hien gio cac phe phai trong trieu dang dau da, day la viec ta khong ngo den. Tuy biet khong the tranh khoi khi thay trieu dai moi, nhung tinh hinh ngay cang nghiem trong."

Task.Title: Co Nhan Chi Tinh 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Trong trieu co mot vi Ly Hoc Si von la ban cu cua cha ta. Nay dang tron den Bang Nguyen Bi Dong. Nguoi hay den giup ong ay, xem nhu thay ta tron nghia voi co nhan."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Bang Nguyen Bi Dong tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Giang Nam Nghia Si</color>,

Task.Title: Co Nhan Chi Tinh 3/3
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Dong Nam Nghia Si</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Bach Thu Lam</color>:"Tot roi, ta khong nen gay han voi bat ky phe nao trong trieu de tranh ruoc hoa vao than."

Task.Title: Am Trung Che Dich 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dai Ly Phu tim <color=#FFCC00>Kieu Tang Tu</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Kieu Tang Tu</color>:"Bon Tieu Dao Tu ngay cang qua dang, ta tung nhieu lan tau voi Hoang Thuong chung la gian diep Tay Ha, nhung bi bo ngoai tai. Hoang thuong uy nhiem ta quan hat 7 Man Toc, viec nay ta nhat dinh khong bo qua."

Task.Title: Am Trung Che Dich 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Kieu Tang Tu</color>:"Than phan 2 nguoi nay ta da dieu tra ro, chi can tim mot hao thu am tham tieu diet the luc chung la duoc."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thien Long Mon Thach Quat tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Bang Chung Anh Hoi</color>.

Task.Title: Am Trung Che Dich 3/4
Task.DoingTalk: tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Phi Ky Binh Dai Kim</color>.

Task.Title: Am Trung Che Dich 4/4
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet <color=#FFCC00>Cam Ve Quan Dai Kim</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Kieu Tang Tu</color>:"Tot roi. Neu Hoang Thuong trach toi ta se ganh het."

Task.Title: Long Nhan Thinh No 1/4
Task.DoingTalk: Den Dai Ly Doan Thi tim <color=#FFCC00>Doan Tri Hung</color>, nhan nhiem vu
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tri Hung</color>:"Viec o Dai Nhat Son Trai tram da nghe hoang huynh noi, Tieu Dao Tu dam lam viec nhu vay qua that dang chet. Nhung Dai Nhat La van trung thanh voi tram nen con tha duoc."

Task.Title: Long Nhan Thinh No 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Tri Hung</color>:"Nguoi hay den cho Dai Nhat La dieu tra lai lich Yeu Yeu, dong thoi canh cao han neu van tiep tuc sai pham tram se khong tha."
Task.DoingTalk: Den Long Mon Thach Quat tim <color=#FFCC00>Dai Nhat La</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Nhat La</color>:"Yeu Yeu duoc ta cuu tren duong ve trong chuyen tien cung nam ngoai. Sau do co ta tien cu su phu cua minh lam quan su, ta khong thay dieu gi bat thuong ca...."

Task.Title: Long Nhan Thinh No 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Nhat La</color>:"Ta...ta khong he hay biet...Tu khi quan su chuyen den Thuong Tien Trang, ta chua gap qua Dai Dieu cua han."
Task.DoingTalk: Tim <color=#FFCC00>Dai Dieu</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Dai Dieu</color>:"...."

Task.Title: Long Nhan Thinh No 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Tim thay dai dieu, phat hien duoi chan no mang theo mot la thu, thi ra bon yeu Yeu nay la gian diep cua Tay Ha.
Task.DoingTalk: Lap tuc ve bao tin cho <color=#FFCC00>Doan Chi Hung</color>,
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#DD0000>Doan Chi Hung</color>:"Nguoi Tay Ha? Bon ho den day lam gi? Viec nay phai dieu tra cho ro."

Task.Title: Truy Na Hai Tac Gia Thien Nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Nghe noi <color=#00CC00>Hai Tac Gia Thien Nhan</color> gan day xuat hien tai <color=#FFFF00>Han Thuy Co Do</color>, nguoi phai truy bat han ve quy an, khoi phuc an ninh noi do
Task.DoingTalk: <color=#00CC00>Truy Bat Hai Tac Gia Thien Nhan</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Ke tu hoa nghi Long Hung, cac noi co chut binh yen. Nhung gan day xuat hien khong it Hai Tac quay nhieu dan lanh. De khoi phuc tri an, Hinh Bo nha mon ra lenh truy na Hai Tac, keu goi moi nguoi trong vo lam tuong tro, vi dan tru hai. Dai Hiep, <color=#FFFF00>Danh Bo Lenh</color> nay thuong cho nguoi, hy vong nguoi co the giup dan truy bat Hai Tac.

Task.CompleteTalk: Ke tu hoa nghi Long Hung, cac noi co chut binh yen. Nhung gan day xuat hien khong it Hai Tac quay nhieu dan lanh. Task.CompleteTalk: Xin chao! Nguoi da hoan thanh nhiem vu thuong hoi, hay nhan nhiem vu tiep theo.

Task.Title: Nhiem vu thuong hoi Giao Thu Cho Nguoi Lien Lac Thuong Hoi
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#DD0000>Chu Thuong Hoi</color>: Nhiem vu tiep theo dua thu cho nguoi lien lac Thuong Hoi, tinh nang Tong Kim.
Task.DoingTalk: Lay 1 thu Thuong Hoi giao cho nguoi lien lac Thuong Hoi
Task.CompleteTalk: Xin chao! Nguoi da hoan thanh nhiem vu thuong hoi, hay nhan nhiem vu tiep theo.
